global_monetary_reference_global_var_fixe = {
	set_global_variable = {
		name = money_value_reference_currency
		value = money_value_reference_currency_flux
	}
	set_global_variable = {
		name = money_value_rapported_inflation_reference_currency
		value = money_value_rapported_inflation_reference_currency_flux
	}
	set_global_variable = {
		name = money_supply_reference_currency
		value = money_supply_reference_currency_flux
	}
	set_global_variable = {
		name = money_supply_stockpile_by_other_country_reference_currency
		value = money_supply_stockpile_by_other_country_reference_currency_flux
	}
}

		name = money_value_median
		value = weighted_average_currency_value

global_gold_silver_production = {
	set_global_variable = {
		name = global_silver_production_fix
		value = global_silver_production_flux
	}
	set_global_variable = {
		name = global_gold_production_fix
		value = global_gold_production_flux
	}
}
currency_of_player = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_dinar_currency
		}
		set_global_variable = {
			name = currency_of_player_is_dinar
			value = 1
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_dinar_algerian_dinar_currency
		}
		set_global_variable = {
			name = currency_of_player_is_dinar_algerian_dinar
			value = 1
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_dinar_iraqi_dinar_currency
		}

			value = 1
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_law = law_type:law_dinar_libyan_dinar_currency

			name = currency_of_player_is_dinar_libyan_dinar
			value = 1
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {

is_treaty_port_disable_pm_market_liquidity = {
	every_scope_state = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_treaty_port = yes
			}
			remove_modifier = offshore_port
			add_modifier = offshore_port
		}
	}
}

#begin_tag_5

	#money_value_target_in_gold
	#dinar
	money_value_dinar_global_var = {
		set_global_variable = {
			name = money_value_dinar_global_var
			value = {
				value = 0
				every_country = {
					limit = {
						has_modifier = dinar_leading_currency_type
					}
					add = money_value_target_real_in_gold #money_value_target_real #money_value
				}
			}
		}
	}

global_monetary_reference_gui = {
	every_country = {
		limit = {
			has_modifier = global_monetary_reference
		}
		global_monetary_reference_1 = yes
	}
}
global_monetary_reference_1 = {
	global_monetary_reference_reset = yes

	#dinar
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_modifier = global_monetary_reference
			has_law = law_type:law_dinar_currency
		}
		set_global_variable = {
			name = global_monetary_reference_dinar
			value = 1
		}
	}
	#dinar_algerian_dinar

		limit = {

}
global_monetary_reference_2 = {
	set_global_variable = {
		name = global_monetary_reference_money_value
		value = {
			value = 0
			every_country = {
				limit = {
					has_modifier = global_monetary_reference
				}
				add = money_value
			}
		}
	}
}
global_monetary_reference_reset = {
	#dinar
	set_global_variable = {
		name = global_monetary_reference_dinar
		value = 0
	}
	#dinar_algerian_dinar
	set_global_variable = {
		name = global_monetary_reference_dinar_algerian_dinar
		value = 0
	}
	#dinar_iraqi_dinar
	set_global_variable = {
		name = global_monetary_reference_dinar_iraqi_dinar
		value = 0
	}
	#dinar_libyan_dinar
	set_global_variable = {
		name = global_monetary_reference_dinar_libyan_dinar
		value = 0
	}
	#dinar_moroccan_dirham
	set_global_variable = {
		name = global_monetary_reference_dinar_moroccan_dirham
		value = 0
	}
	#dinar_omanian_rial
	set_global_variable = {
		name = global_monetary_reference_dinar_omanian_rial

	# ███████╗██╗     ██╗   ██╗ ██████╗████████╗██╗   ██╗ █████╗ ████████╗██╗ ██████╗ ███╗   ██╗███████╗        ███╗   ███╗ ██████╗ ███╗   ██╗███████╗██╗   ██╗    ██╗   ██╗ █████╗ ██╗     ██╗   ██╗███████╗
	# ██╔════╝██║     ██║   ██║██╔════╝╚══██╔══╝██║   ██║██╔══██╗╚══██╔══╝██║██╔═══██╗████╗  ██║██╔════╝        ████╗ ████║██╔═══██╗████╗  ██║██╔════╝╚██╗ ██╔╝    ██║   ██║██╔══██╗██║     ██║   ██║██╔════╝
	# █████╗  ██║     ██║   ██║██║        ██║   ██║   ██║███████║   ██║   ██║██║   ██║██╔██╗ ██║███████╗        ██╔████╔██║██║   ██║██╔██╗ ██║█████╗   ╚████╔╝     ██║   ██║███████║██║     ██║   ██║█████╗
	# ██╔══╝  ██║     ██║   ██║██║        ██║   ██║   ██║██╔══██║   ██║   ██║██║   ██║██║╚██╗██║╚════██║        ██║╚██╔╝██║██║   ██║██║╚██╗██║██╔══╝    ╚██╔╝      ╚██╗ ██╔╝██╔══██║██║     ██║   ██║██╔══╝
	# ██║     ███████╗╚██████╔╝╚██████╗   ██║   ╚██████╔╝██║  ██║   ██║   ██║╚██████╔╝██║ ╚████║███████║███████╗██║ ╚═╝ ██║╚██████╔╝██║ ╚████║███████╗   ██║███████╗╚████╔╝ ██║  ██║███████╗╚██████╔╝███████╗
	# ╚═╝     ╚══════╝ ╚═════╝  ╚═════╝   ╚═╝    ╚═════╝ ╚═╝  ╚═╝   ╚═╝   ╚═╝ ╚═════╝ ╚═╝  ╚═══╝╚══════╝╚══════╝╚═╝     ╚═╝ ╚═════╝ ╚═╝  ╚═══╝╚══════╝   ╚═╝╚══════╝ ╚═══╝  ╚═╝  ╚═╝╚══════╝ ╚═════╝ ╚══════╝

	###########################################################################################################################################################################################
	###########################################################################################################################################################################################
	###########################################################################################################################################################################################
	###########################################################################################################################################################################################

	fluctuations_money_value_1_year = {
		change_variable = {
			name = money_value_fixe_var_1_1Y
			add = 1
		}

		if = {
			limit = {
				var:money_value_fixe_var_1_1Y = 1
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = money_value_var_half_1_year
				value = money_value_rapported_inflation
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:money_value_fixe_var_1_1Y = 2
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = money_value_var_1_year
				value = money_value_rapported_inflation
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = money_value_dif_1
				value = 0
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = money_value_dif_1
				add = var:money_value_var_1_year
			}
			change_variable = { #test
				name = money_value_dif_1
				subtract = var:money_value_var_half_1_year
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = money_value_dif_1
				divide = var:money_value_var_half_1_year
			}

			set_variable = {
				name = money_value_fixe_var_1_1Y
				value = 0
			}

			if = {
				limit = {
					money_value_dif_1_final < -0.5
					not = {
						#protection de la devise lorsque le joeur ou y a change de standart monetaire de silver vers au-dessus, en effet la money value peut baisser alors que la parité à l'or reste la meme
						#2 manière d'avoir ce modificateur:
						#- soit changer le standart
						#- soit changer la valeur du standart -> n peut pas modifier aussi rapidement la valeur et donc ne déclancherai quoi qu'il en soit pas de crise
						has_modifier = foreign_exchange_controls
					}
				}
				#plus de protection comme pour central_bank_bankruptcy & country_bankruptcy
				currency_crisis = yes
			}
		}
	}
	fluctuations_money_value_5_year = {
		change_variable = {
			name = money_value_fixe_var_1_5Y
			add = 1
		}

		if = {
			limit = {

			}

				value = money_value_rapported_inflation
			}
		}
		if = {

			set_variable = {
				name = money_value_var_5_year
				value = money_value_rapported_inflation
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = money_value_dif_5
				value = 0
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = money_value_dif_5
				add = var:money_value_var_5_year
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = money_value_dif_5
				subtract = var:money_value_var_half_5_year
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = money_value_dif_5
				divide = var:money_value_var_half_5_year
			}

			set_variable = {
				name = money_value_fixe_var_1_5Y

	fluctuations_gdp_1_year = {
		change_variable = {
			name = gdp_fixe_var_1_1Y
			add = 1
		}

		if = {
			limit = {
				var:gdp_fixe_var_1_1Y = 1
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = GDP_var_half_1_year
				value = gdp
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:gdp_fixe_var_1_1Y = 2
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = GDP_var_1_year
				value = gdp
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = GDP_dif_1
				value = 0
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = GDP_dif_1
				add = var:GDP_var_1_year
			}
			change_variable = { #test
				name = GDP_dif_1
				subtract = var:GDP_var_half_1_year
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = GDP_dif_1
				divide = var:GDP_var_half_1_year
			}

			set_variable = {
				name = gdp_fixe_var_1_1Y
				value = 0
			}
			if = {
				limit  = {
					GDP_dif_1_final < -0.5
					# is_subject_custom_trigger = no
					# global_country_ranking < 50
					# has_modifier = has_financial_center
					# not = {
					# 	has_modifier = economic_instability
					# }
				}
				economic_crisis = yes
			}
			#country_bankruptcy
			if = {
				limit  = {
					has_modifier = declared_bankruptcy
					not  = {
						#has_modifier = economic_instability
						var:country_bankruptcy = 1 #cette variable ne peut etre reset que si le moddifier declared_bankruptcy n'esxiste plus pour le pays donc qu'il ce soit fait reset par le country_ratting
					}
				}
				country_bankruptcy = yes
			}
		}
	}

	cumulative_inflation_5_year = {
		change_variable = {
			name = cumulative_inflation_5_year_counter
			add = 1
		}

		#_1
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:cumulative_inflation_5_year_counter = 1
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = cumulative_inflation_5_year_1
				value = inflation_value
			}
		}
		#_2
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:cumulative_inflation_5_year_counter = 2
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = cumulative_inflation_5_year_2
				value = inflation_value
			}
		}
		#_3
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:cumulative_inflation_5_year_counter = 3
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = cumulative_inflation_5_year_3
				value = inflation_value
			}
		}
		#_4
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:cumulative_inflation_5_year_counter = 4
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = cumulative_inflation_5_year_4
				value = inflation_value
			}
		}
		#_5
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:cumulative_inflation_5_year_counter = 5
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = cumulative_inflation_5_year_5
				value = inflation_value
			}
		}

		if = {
			limit = {
				var:cumulative_inflation_5_year_counter >= 5
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = cumulative_inflation_5_year_counter
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}

	inflation_on_consumer_goods_market_value_fluctuations = {
		change_variable = {
			name = inflation_on_consumer_goods_market_value_fluctuations_month_1
			add = 1
		}

		#inflation_on_consumer_goods_market_value_dif_01
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:inflation_on_consumer_goods_market_value_fluctuations_month_1 = 1
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = inflation_on_consumer_goods_market_value_fluctuations_var_month_1
				value = inflation_on_consumer_goods_market_value_abs
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:inflation_on_consumer_goods_market_value_fluctuations_month_1 = 2
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = inflation_on_consumer_goods_market_value_fluctuations_var_month_2
				value = inflation_on_consumer_goods_market_value_abs
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = inflation_on_consumer_goods_market_value_dif_01
				value = 0
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = inflation_on_consumer_goods_market_value_dif_01
				add = var:inflation_on_consumer_goods_market_value_fluctuations_var_month_2
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = inflation_on_consumer_goods_market_value_dif_01
				subtract = var:inflation_on_consumer_goods_market_value_fluctuations_var_month_1
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = inflation_on_consumer_goods_market_value_dif_01
				divide = var:inflation_on_consumer_goods_market_value_fluctuations_var_month_1
			}
			inflation_on_consumer_goods_rolling_inflation_6_months_effect = yes
		}

		#inflation_on_consumer_goods_market_value_dif_02

			change_variable = {

				divide = var:inflation_on_consumer_goods_market_value_fluctuations_var_month_3
			}
			inflation_on_consumer_goods_rolling_inflation_6_months_effect = yes

	#money_value_dif_01 #6m
	money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations = {
		change_variable = {
			name = money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations_month_1
			add = 1
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations_month_1 = 1
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations_var_month_1
				value = money_value
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations_month_1 = 2
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations_var_month_2
				value = money_value
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = money_value_dif_01_market_value_dif_01
				value = 0
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = money_value_dif_01_market_value_dif_01
				add = var:money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations_var_month_2
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = money_value_dif_01_market_value_dif_01
				subtract = var:money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations_var_month_1
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = money_value_dif_01_market_value_dif_01
				divide = var:money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations_var_month_1
			}
			# change_variable = {
			#     name = money_value_dif_01_market_value_dif_01
			# 	multiply = -1
			# }
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations_month_1 = 3
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations_var_month_3
				value = money_value
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations_month_1 = 4
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations_var_month_4
				value = money_value
			}

			set_variable = {
				name = money_value_dif_01_market_value_dif_02
				value = 0
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = money_value_dif_01_market_value_dif_02
				add = var:money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations_var_month_4
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = money_value_dif_01_market_value_dif_02
				subtract = var:money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations_var_month_3
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = money_value_dif_01_market_value_dif_02
				divide = var:money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations_var_month_3
			}
			# change_variable = {
			#     name = money_value_dif_01_market_value_dif_02
			# 	multiply = -1
			# }
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations_month_1 = 5
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations_var_month_5
				value = money_value
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations_month_1 = 6
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations_var_month_6
				value = money_value
			}


			set_variable = {
				name = money_value_dif_01_market_value_dif_03
				value = 0
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = money_value_dif_01_market_value_dif_03
				add = var:money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations_var_month_6
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = money_value_dif_01_market_value_dif_03
				subtract = var:money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations_var_month_5
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = money_value_dif_01_market_value_dif_03
				divide = var:money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations_var_month_5
			}
			# change_variable = {
			#     name = money_value_dif_01_market_value_dif_03
			# 	multiply = -1
			# }
		}

		money_value_dif_01_rolling_inflation_6_months_effect = yes
		reset_money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations_month_1 = yes
	}
	money_value_dif_01_rolling_inflation_6_months_effect = {
		set_variable = {
			name = money_value_dif_01_rolling_inflation_6_months
			value = var:money_value_dif_01_market_value_dif_01
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = money_value_dif_01_rolling_inflation_6_months
			add = var:money_value_dif_01_market_value_dif_02
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = money_value_dif_01_rolling_inflation_6_months
			add = var:money_value_dif_01_market_value_dif_03
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = money_value_dif_01_rolling_inflation_6_months
			divide = 3
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = money_value_dif_01_rolling_inflation_6_months
			multiply = -1
		}
	}
	reset_money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations_month_1 = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations_month_1 = 8
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = money_value_dif_01_market_value_fluctuations_month_1
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}

	#monetary_policy_inflation
	monetary_policy_inflation = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				not = {
					has_variable = monetary_policy_inflation
				}
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = monetary_policy_inflation
				value = 0
			}
		}

		#law_revaluation
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_law = law_type:law_revaluation
				has_modifier = revaluation_currency_25
				money_supply_state_ratio > 0.10
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = monetary_policy_inflation
				subtract = 0.25
			}
		}
		#law_devaluation
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_law = law_type:law_devaluation
				has_modifier = devaluation_currency_25
				money_supply_state_ratio > 0.10
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = monetary_policy_inflation
				add = 0.25
			}
		}

		################################################################################################

		if = {
			limit = {
				var:devaluation_on = 1
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = monetary_policy_inflation
				add = var:inflation_value_predicted_devaluation_month_valided
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:revaluation_on = 1
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = monetary_policy_inflation
				add = var:inflation_value_predicted_revaluation_month_valided
			}
		}
	}
	monetary_policy_inflation_reset = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:monetary_policy_inflation < -1
				var:devaluation_on = 0
				var:revaluation_on = 0
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = monetary_policy_inflation
				add = 1
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:monetary_policy_inflation > 1
				var:devaluation_on = 0
				var:revaluation_on = 0
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = monetary_policy_inflation
				subtract = 1
			}
		}
	}
	monetary_policy_inflation_reset_law = {
		activate_law = law_type:law_no_monetary_policy
		random_scope_building = {
			limit = {
				is_building_group = bg_bank
			}
			remove_modifier = devaluation_currency_25
			remove_modifier = devaluation_currency_50
			remove_modifier = devaluation_currency_75
			remove_modifier = devaluation_currency_100
			remove_modifier = revaluation_currency_25
			remove_modifier = revaluation_currency_50
			remove_modifier = revaluation_currency_75
			remove_modifier = revaluation_currency_100
		}
	}
	monetary_policy_inflation_base_rate = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_modifier = rise_base_rate
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = monetary_policy_inflation
				add = -0.5
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_modifier = down_base_rate
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = monetary_policy_inflation
				add = 0.5
			}
		}
	}

	###########################################################################################################################################################################################
	###########################################################################################################################################################################################

	currency_strength_modifier = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_modifier = reference_currency
			}
			remove_modifier = reference_currency
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_modifier = reference_currency_no
			}
			remove_modifier = reference_currency_no
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_modifier = strong_currency
			}
			remove_modifier = strong_currency
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_modifier = balanced_currency
			}
			remove_modifier = balanced_currency
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_modifier = weak_currency
			}
			remove_modifier = weak_currency
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_modifier = extreme_weak_currency
			}
			remove_modifier = extreme_weak_currency
		}

		#################################################################
		#reference_currency
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_reference_currency = yes
			}
			add_modifier = {
				name = reference_currency
				#multiplier = difference_with_average_gold_exchange_rate_currencies_revers_100
			}
		}

		if = {
			limit = {
				is_reference_currency_no = yes
			}
			add_modifier = {
				name = reference_currency_no
			}
		}
		#################################################################
		#strong_currency
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_strong_currency = yes
			}
			add_modifier = {
				name = strong_currency
				multiplier = difference_with_average_gold_exchange_rate_currencies_revers_100
			}
		}
		#################################################################
		#balanced_currency
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_balanced_currency = yes
			}
			add_modifier = {
				name = balanced_currency
			}
		}
		#################################################################
		#weak_currency
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_weak_currency = yes
			}
			add_modifier = {
				name = weak_currency
				multiplier = difference_with_average_gold_exchange_rate_currencies_revers_100
			}
		}
		#################################################################
		#extreme_weak_currency
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_extreme_weak_currency = yes
			}
			add_modifier = {
				name = extreme_weak_currency
				multiplier = difference_with_average_gold_exchange_rate_currencies_revers_100
			}
		}
		#################################################################

		#################################################################

		#central_bank_bankruptcy
		if = {
			limit  = {
				#Valeur de la monaie <0.01 = definition crash BC
				has_modifier = extreme_weak_currency #çà veux dire çà money_value_in_gold < 0.01
				#on exclu les pays qui sont deja entré dans la bankruptcy :
				has_central_bank_SS_BS_GS_GES = yes #un  pays  en  fiat  standart  à cause  d'une première  crise ne refera pas de crise en boucle, il sera bloqué en fiat  standart
				not  = {
					var:central_bank_bankruptcy = 1 #trigger uniquement pour pays pas deja dans le bankruptcy
					var:extreme_weak_currency_solution_count > 1 #idem sachant que ce code est directement ap ce qui va attribué le modifier extreme_weak_currency -> pas le temps encore de compter
				}
			}
			central_bank_bankruptcy = yes
		}

		if = {
			limit  = {
				var:central_bank_bankruptcy = 1
				has_technology_researched = metalique_standard #ne peut appliquer le la  crise si en fiat avant metalique standart
				not = {
					money_supply_stockpile_by_other_country = 0
				}
			}
			root = {
				save_scope_as = target_country
			}

			if = {
				limit  = {
					has_modifier = has_central_bank
				}
				every_country = {
					if = {
						limit  = {
							has_modifier = has_central_bank
							not = {
								this = root
							}
						}
						save_scope_as = seller
						all_currency_resold = yes
					}
				}
				change_variable = {
					name = test_var_1
					add = 1
				}
			}

			if = {
				limit = {
					or = {
						var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar_algerian_dinar > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar_iraqi_dinar > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar_libyan_dinar > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar_moroccan_dirham > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar_omanian_rial > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar_qiran > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar_saudi_riyal > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar_serbian_dinar > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar_tunisian_dinar > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar_yugoslav_dinar > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_dollar_australian_dollar > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_dollar_canadian_dollar > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_dollar_caribbean_dollar > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_dollar_confederate_states_dollar > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_dollar_liberian_dollar > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_dollar_new_zealand_dollar > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_dollar_sierra_leonean_dollar > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_dollar_united_states_dollar > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_eco_ariary > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_eco_central_african_eco > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_eco_east_african_eco > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_eco_ethiopian_birr > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_eco_ghanaian_pound > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_eco_nigerian_naira > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_eco_south_african_rand > 0

						var:debt_in_national_currency_eco_west_african_eco > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_franc_belgian_franc > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_franc_french_franc > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_franc_luxembourgish_franc > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_franc_swiss_franc > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_gulden > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_gulden_bavarian_gulden > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_gulden_florin > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_gulden_hungarian_forint > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_gulden_indies_guilder > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_gulden_south_german_gulden > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_krone_czech_koruna > 0
						var:debt_in_national_currency_krone_danish_krone > 0

						var:debt_in_national_currency_peso > 0

						var:debt_in_national_currency_peso_el_salvador_colon > 0

					}
				}

				reset_debt_in_currency = yes
				set_variable = {
					name = trade_balance_in_gold_fixe
					value = trade_balance_in_gold

					value = trade_balance_in_gold_delta
				}
				set_variable = {
					name = export_value_in_gold_week_fix
					value = export_value_in_gold_week
				}
				set_variable = {
					name = import_value_in_gold_week_fix
					value = import_value_in_gold_week
				}
			}
		}
	}
	inflation_modifier = {
		# remove_modifier = deflation_country
		# remove_modifier = inflation_country

		if = {
			limit = {
				has_modifier = inflation_country
			}
			remove_modifier = inflation_country
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_modifier = deflation_country
			}
			remove_modifier = deflation_country
		}

		if = {
			limit = {
				inflation_value > 0.02
			}
			add_modifier = {
				name = inflation_country
				multiplier = inflation_value_for_modifier
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				inflation_value < -0.02
			}
			add_modifier = {
				name = deflation_country
				multiplier = inflation_value_for_modifier
			}
		}



		# if = {
		# 	limit = {
		# 		has_modifier = foreign_exchange_controls

		# 				var:devaluation_on = 1

		# 			}
		# 		}
		# 	}
		# 	remove_modifier = foreign_exchange_controls

		# 		not = {
		# 			or = {
		# 				var:devaluation_on = 1

		# 			}
		# 		}
		# 	}
		# 	add_modifier = {

		# }

	# silver flucuation
	###########################################################################################################################################################################################
	###########################################################################################################################################################################################
	###########################################################################################################################################################################################
	###########################################################################################################################################################################################

	fluctuations_silver_to_gold_rate_1_year = {
		change_variable = {
			name = silver_to_gold_rate_fixe_var_1_1Y
			add = 1
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:silver_to_gold_rate_fixe_var_1_1Y = 1
			}
			set_global_variable = {
				name = silver_to_gold_rate_var_half_1_year
				value = silver_to_gold_rate
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:silver_to_gold_rate_fixe_var_1_1Y = 2
			}
			set_global_variable = {
				name = silver_to_gold_rate_var_1_year
				value = silver_to_gold_rate
			}
			set_global_variable = {
				name = silver_to_gold_rate_dif_1
				value = 0
			}
			change_global_variable = {
				name = silver_to_gold_rate_dif_1
				add = global_var:silver_to_gold_rate_var_1_year
			}
			change_global_variable = {
				name = silver_to_gold_rate_dif_1
				subtract = global_var:silver_to_gold_rate_var_half_1_year
			}
			change_global_variable = {
				name = silver_to_gold_rate_dif_1
				divide = global_var:silver_to_gold_rate_var_half_1_year
			}

			set_variable = {
				name = silver_to_gold_rate_fixe_var_1_1Y
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}
#brace

	money_value_target_modification = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				not = {
					or = {
						has_modifier = foreign_exchange_controls
						has_modifier = monetary_systeme_transition
					}
					AND = {
						#bloquer la revaluation des silver standart à partir de 1873 pour eviter des chose abrante sur le money value target
						game_date >= 1873.1.1
						has_law = law_type:law_silver_standard
					}
					#pour le bimetalisme ce callera sur l'or meme si les reserve sont majoritairement silver
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					devaluation_money_value_target_trigger = yes
					not = {
						or = {
							is_subject_custom_trigger = yes
							market_owner_is_root_univ_with_buiding = yes
						}
					}
				}
				devaluation_money_value_target = yes

				#event player
				capital= {
					save_scope_as = capital_state
				}
				save_scope_as = target_country

				every_country = {
					limit = {
						is_player = yes
						scope:target_country = {
							scripted_money_value_target = no #test empeche UK et Mex d'avoir une notification pour indiquer une modification de parité inverse
						}
 					}
					trigger_event = 00_ef_economic_event.31
				}

				remove_modifier = devaluation_currency_target
				add_modifier = {
					name = devaluation_currency_target
					months = 12
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					revaluation_money_value_target_trigger = yes
					not = {
						or = {
							is_subject_custom_trigger = yes
							market_owner_is_root_univ_with_buiding = yes
						}
					}
				}
				revaluation_money_value_target = yes

				#event player
				capital= {
					save_scope_as = capital_state
				}
				save_scope_as = target_country

				every_country = {
					limit = {
						is_player = yes
						scope:target_country = {
							scripted_money_value_target = no #test empeche UK et Mex d'avoir une notification pour indiquer une modification de parité inverse
						}
					}
					trigger_event = 00_ef_economic_event.32
				}

				remove_modifier = revaluation_currency_target
				add_modifier = {
					name = revaluation_currency_target
					months = 12
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					or = {
						is_subject_custom_trigger = yes
						market_owner_is_root_univ_with_buiding = yes
					}
				}
				subject_money_value_target = yes
			}
		}
	}
	devaluation_money_value_target = {
		#Scripted
		if = {
			limit = {
				scripted_money_value_target = yes
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = money_value_target_1_old
				value = devaluation_money_value_target
			}
			devaluation_revaluation_money_value_target_scripted_silver_bimetallism = yes
			devaluation_revaluation_money_value_target_scripted_gold = yes
			change_variable = {
				name = devaluation_money_value_target_count
				add = 1
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = test_var_2
				add = 1
			}
		}

		#Generic
		if = {
			limit = {
				not = {
					scripted_money_value_target = yes
				}
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = money_value_target_1_old
				value = var:money_value_target_1
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = money_value_target_1
				value = devaluation_money_value_target
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = devaluation_money_value_target_count
				add = 1
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = test_var_2
				add = 1
			}
		}
	}
	revaluation_money_value_target = {
		#Scripted
		if = {
			limit = {
				scripted_money_value_target = yes
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = money_value_target_1_old
				value = var:money_value_target_1
			}
			devaluation_revaluation_money_value_target_scripted_silver_bimetallism = yes
			devaluation_revaluation_money_value_target_scripted_gold = yes
			change_variable = {
				name = revaluation_money_value_target_count
				add = 1
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = test_var_2
				add = 1
			}
		}

		#Generic
		if = {
			limit = {
				not = {
					scripted_money_value_target = yes
				}
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = money_value_target_1_old
				value = var:money_value_target_1
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = money_value_target_1
				value = revaluation_money_value_target
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = revaluation_money_value_target_count
				add = 1
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = test_var_2
				add = 1
			}
		}
	}
	subject_money_value_target = {
		set_variable = {
			name = money_value_target_1
			value = overlord_money_value_target
		}
	}

	monetary_systeme_transition = {
		#Silver -> Bimetalisme
		if = {
			limit = {
				not = {
					has_modifier = monetary_systeme_transition
				}
				is_monetary_systeme_transition_valid_country_to_bimetalisme = yes
				is_monetary_systeme_transition_valid_country_to_gold_exchange_standard = no
			}
			#money_value_target_pre_set = yes
			activate_law = law_type:law_bimetallism_standard
			# central_bank_production_methods = yes
			# remove_modifier = foreign_exchange_controls
			# add_modifier = {
			# 	name = foreign_exchange_controls
			# 	months = 12
			# }
			# reset_debt_in_currency_for_monetary_systeme_transition = yes
			# set_variable = {
			# 	name = money_value_ta rget_1
			# 	value = money_value_target_bimetlic
			# }
			# trade_balance = yes
			# add_modifier = {
			# 	name = monetary_systeme_transition
			# 	months = 120
			# }
		}

		#Silver -> gold/Bimealisme -> Gold
		if = {
			limit = {
				not = {
					has_modifier = monetary_systeme_transition
				}
				is_monetary_systeme_transition_valid_country_to_gold = yes
				is_monetary_systeme_transition_valid_country_to_gold_exchange_standard = no
			}
			#money_value_target_pre_set = yes
			activate_law = law_type:law_gold_standard
			# central_bank_production_methods = yes
			# remove_modifier = foreign_exchange_controls
			# add_modifier = {
			# 	name = foreign_exchange_controls
			# 	months = 12
			# }
			# reset_debt_in_currency_for_monetary_systeme_transition = yes
			# set_variable = {
			# 	name = money_value_target_1
			# 	value = global_var:money_value_median
			# }
			# trade_balance = yes
			# add_modifier = {
			# 	name = monetary_systeme_transition
			# 	months = 120
			# }
		}

		#Gold -> gold_exchange_standard
		if = {
			limit = {
				not = {
					has_modifier = monetary_systeme_transition
				}
				is_monetary_systeme_transition_valid_country_to_gold_exchange_standard = yes
			}
			money_value_target_pre_set = yes
			activate_law = law_type:law_gold_exchange_standard
			# central_bank_production_methods = yes
			# central_bank_production_methods_3 = yes
			# remove_modifier = foreign_exchange_controls
			# add_modifier = {
			# 	name = foreign_exchange_controls
			# 	months = 12
			# }
			# #money_value_target_modification = yes
			# # set_variable = {
			# # 	name = money_value_target_1
			# # 	value = money_value
			# # }
			# set_variable = {
			# 	name = money_value_target_1
			# 	value = money_value_target_pre_set
			# }
			# trade_balance = yes
			# add_modifier = {
			# 	name = monetary_systeme_transition
			# 	months = 120
			# }
		}
	}

	###########################
	#desactivé ?
	money_creation_in_foreign_exchange_reserve = {
		if = { #si  la devise ne doit pas etre revalué et que la couverture en or est supperieur à 75% alors il y a impression de devise
			limit = {
				not = {
					root.revaluation_score > root.devaluation_score_2
				}
				central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent > 0.75
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = money_value_target_complete
				value = {
					value = 0
					add = money_value_target
					subtract = money_supply
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_law = law_type:law_dinar_currency
				}
				every_scope_state = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						}
						change_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_dinar_state_1
							add = owner.var:money_value_target_complete
						}
					}
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					has_law = law_type:law_dinar_algerian_dinar_currency
				}
				every_scope_state = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						}
						change_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_dinar_algerian_dinar_state_1
							add = owner.var:money_value_target_complete
						}
					}
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					has_law = law_type:law_dinar_iraqi_dinar_currency
				}
				every_scope_state = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						}
						change_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_dinar_iraqi_dinar_state_1
							add = owner.var:money_value_target_complete
						}
					}
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					has_law = law_type:law_dinar_libyan_dinar_currency
				}
				every_scope_state = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						}
						change_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_dinar_libyan_dinar_state_1
							add = owner.var:money_value_target_complete
						}
					}
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					has_law = law_type:law_dinar_moroccan_dirham_currency
				}
				every_scope_state = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						}
						change_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_dinar_moroccan_dirham_state_1
							add = owner.var:money_value_target_complete
						}
					}
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					has_law = law_type:law_dinar_omanian_rial_currency
				}
				every_scope_state = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						}
						change_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_dinar_omanian_rial_state_1
							add = owner.var:money_value_target_complete
						}
					}
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					has_law = law_type:law_dinar_qiran_currency
				}
				every_scope_state = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						}
						change_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_dinar_qiran_state_1
							add = owner.var:money_value_target_complete
						}
					}
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					has_law = law_type:law_dinar_saudi_riyal_currency
				}
				every_scope_state = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						}
						change_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_dinar_saudi_riyal_state_1
							add = owner.var:money_value_target_complete
						}
					}
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					has_law = law_type:law_dinar_serbian_dinar_currency
				}
				every_scope_state = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						}
						change_variable = {

	}
	money_destruction_in_foreign_exchange_reserve = {
		set_variable = {
			name = money_value_target_complete_destruction
			value = {
				value = 0
				add = money_value_target
				subtract = money_supply
			}
		}

		if = {
			limit = {
				money_supply > var:money_value_target_complete_destruction
			}

			if = {
				limit = {
					has_law = law_type:law_dinar_currency
				}
				every_scope_state = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						}
						change_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_dinar_state_1
							add = owner.var:money_value_target_complete_destruction
						}
					}
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					has_law = law_type:law_dinar_algerian_dinar_currency
				}
				every_scope_state = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						}
						change_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_dinar_algerian_dinar_state_1
							add = owner.var:money_value_target_complete_destruction
						}
					}
				}
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					has_law = law_type:law_dinar_iraqi_dinar_currency

	extreme_weak_currency_solution_player = {
		change_variable = {
			name = extreme_weak_currency_solution_count_player
			add = 1
		}
	}

	extreme_weak_currency_solution = {
		change_variable = {
			name = extreme_weak_currency_solution_count
			add = 1
		}
		#reset currency
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:extreme_weak_currency_solution_count >= 0 #3
				not = {
					or = {
						has_modifier = central_bank_bankruptcy_country
						has_modifier = currency_crisis_country
					}
				}
			}

 			reset_balance = yes
			reset_debt_currency_reserve_and_export_value = yes
			reset_law_event_currency  = yes

			set_variable = new_currency_recreat

			law_no_monetary_system_with_tech_currency_standards = yes

			introduction_new_currency = yes

			set_variable = {
				name = extreme_weak_currency_solution_count
				value = 0
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = new_currency_count
				add = 1
			}
			money_value_global_var = yes
 			reset_balance = yes #recalcule de la balance fianl
		}
	}

	reset_balance = {
		#############################################################
		#rest balance to be sure
		root = {
			save_scope_as = target_country
		}
		currency_law_list = yes
		every_country = {
			if = {
				limit  = {
					has_modifier = has_central_bank
					not = {
						this = root
					}
				}
				save_scope_as = seller
				all_currency_resold = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				or = {
					var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar > 0
					var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar_algerian_dinar > 0

	reset_law_event_currency = {
		capital = {
			save_scope_as = central_bank_site
		}

		#dinar
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_currency
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = circulating_dinar_c_var_1
				value = 0
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = government_loan
				value = 0
			}
			add_investment_pool = {
				subtract = private_bank_funds
			}
			scope:central_bank_site = {
				set_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_dinar_state_1
					value = 0
				}
				set_variable = {
					name = silver_state_1
					value = 0
				}
				set_variable = {
					name = gold_state_1
					value = 0
				}
			}
		}
		#dinar_algerian_dinar
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_algerian_dinar_currency
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = circulating_dinar_algerian_dinar_c_var_1
				value = 0
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = government_loan
				value = 0
			}
			add_investment_pool = {
				subtract = private_bank_funds
			}

				value = trade_balance_in_gold
			}

	# ██████╗ ███████╗██╗   ██╗ █████╗ ██╗     ██╗   ██╗ █████╗ ████████╗██╗ ██████╗ ███╗   ██╗    ██╗██████╗ ███████╗██╗   ██╗ █████╗ ██╗     ██╗   ██╗ █████╗ ████████╗██╗ ██████╗ ███╗   ██╗
	# ██╔══██╗██╔════╝██║   ██║██╔══██╗██║     ██║   ██║██╔══██╗╚══██╔══╝██║██╔═══██╗████╗  ██║   ██╔╝██╔══██╗██╔════╝██║   ██║██╔══██╗██║     ██║   ██║██╔══██╗╚══██╔══╝██║██╔═══██╗████╗  ██║
	# ██║  ██║█████╗  ██║   ██║███████║██║     ██║   ██║███████║   ██║   ██║██║   ██║██╔██╗ ██║  ██╔╝ ██████╔╝█████╗  ██║   ██║███████║██║     ██║   ██║███████║   ██║   ██║██║   ██║██╔██╗ ██║
	# ██║  ██║██╔══╝  ╚██╗ ██╔╝██╔══██║██║     ██║   ██║██╔══██║   ██║   ██║██║   ██║██║╚██╗██║ ██╔╝  ██╔══██╗██╔══╝  ╚██╗ ██╔╝██╔══██║██║     ██║   ██║██╔══██║   ██║   ██║██║   ██║██║╚██╗██║
	# ██████╔╝███████╗ ╚████╔╝ ██║  ██║███████╗╚██████╔╝██║  ██║   ██║   ██║╚██████╔╝██║ ╚████║██╔╝   ██║  ██║███████╗ ╚████╔╝ ██║  ██║███████╗╚██████╔╝██║  ██║   ██║   ██║╚██████╔╝██║ ╚████║
	# ╚═════╝ ╚══════╝  ╚═══╝  ╚═╝  ╚═╝╚══════╝ ╚═════╝ ╚═╝  ╚═╝   ╚═╝   ╚═╝ ╚═════╝ ╚═╝  ╚═══╝╚═╝    ╚═╝  ╚═╝╚══════╝  ╚═══╝  ╚═╝  ╚═╝╚══════╝ ╚═════╝ ╚═╝  ╚═╝   ╚═╝   ╚═╝ ╚═════╝ ╚═╝  ╚═══╝

	############################################################################################################################################################
	############################################################################################################################################################
	############################################################################################################################################################
	############################################################################################################################################################

	devaluation_on = {
		change_variable = {
			name = devaluation_on_time
			add = 1
		}

		if = {
			limit = {
				var:devaluation_on_time = devaluation_time_month
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = devaluation_on
				value = 0
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = money_value_target_1
				value = var:money_value_target_valided
			}



			############# Reset
			set_variable = {
				name = devaluation_on_time
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}
	revaluation_on = {
		change_variable = {
			name = revaluation_on_time
			add = 1
		}

		if = {
			limit = {
				var:revaluation_on_time = revaluation_time_month
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = revaluation_on
				value = 0
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = money_value_target_1
				value = var:money_value_target_valided
			}


			############# Reset
			set_variable = {
				name = revaluation_on_time
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}

stockpiling_central_bank_metal_reserves_state = {
	# if = {
	# 	limit = {
	# 		or = {
	# 			has_law = law_type:law_gold_standard
	# 			has_law = law_type:law_bimetallism_standard
	# 		}
	# 	}
	# 	storing_gold_1 = yes

	# }
	# if = {
	# 	limit = {
	# 		or = {
	# 			has_law = law_type:law_silver_standard
	# 			has_law = law_type:law_bimetallism_standard
	# 		}
	# 	}
	# 	storing_silver_1 = yes

	# }

	storing_gold_1 = yes
	storing_silver_1 = yes
}
storing_gold_1 = {
    every_scope_state = {
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
				is_capital = yes
            }
            save_scope_as = central_bank_site
		}
	}

	#######################################################################
	#cela est pour récupérer la valeur de l'etat
	set_variable = {
		name = gold_state_var_1
		value = gold_state_native_for_stockpile
	}
	#######################################################################

    if = {
        limit = {
			gold_market_goods_sell_orders > 0
        }
		set_variable = {
			name = stockpiling_gold_var_2
			value = gold_market_goods_sell_orders
		}
        change_variable = {
            name = stockpiling_gold_var_2
           # multiply = 1000
            multiply = 100
        }
        change_variable = {
            name = stockpiling_gold_var_2
            multiply = 4 #month
        }
		# if = {
		# 	limit = {
		# 		has_law = law_type:law_bimetallism_standard
		# 	}
		# 	change_variable = {
		# 		name = stockpiling_gold_var_2
		# 		multiply = bimetallic_rate_gold_to_silver
		# 	}
		# }
		change_variable = {
			name = gold_state_var_1
			add = var:stockpiling_gold_var_2
		}
		scope:central_bank_site = {
			set_variable = {
				name = gold_state_1
				value = root.var:gold_state_var_1
			}
		}
    }
}
storing_silver_1 = {
    every_scope_state = {
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
				is_capital = yes
            }
            save_scope_as = central_bank_site
		}
	}

	#######################################################################
	#cela est pour récupérer la valeur de l'etat
	set_variable = {
		name = silver_state_var_1
		value = silver_state_native_for_stockpile
	}
	#######################################################################

    if = {
        limit = {
			silver_market_goods_sell_orders > 0
        }

		set_variable = {
			name = stockpiling_silver_var_2
			value = silver_market_goods_sell_orders
		}
        change_variable = {
            name = stockpiling_silver_var_2
            #multiply = 1000
            multiply = 100
        }
        change_variable = {
            name = stockpiling_silver_var_2
            multiply = 4 #month
        }
		change_variable = {
			name = stockpiling_silver_var_2
			multiply = gold_to_silver_rate
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = silver_state_var_1
			add = var:stockpiling_silver_var_2
		}
		scope:central_bank_site = {
			set_variable = {
				name = silver_state_1
				value = root.var:silver_state_var_1
			}
		}
    }
}
government_loan_month = {
	change_variable = {
		name = government_loan
		add = country_minting_month
	}
}
trade_balance = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			import_in_gold > 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = debt_in_gold #debt_in_gold_sc
			add = import_in_gold
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			export_in_gold > 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = excess_in_gold #excess_in_gold_sc
			add = export_in_gold
		}
	}
	set_variable = { #je la fixe toujours ici meme s ce n'ai pluvraiment nécessaire, 19/11/25: pour l GUI non ?
		name = trade_balance_in_gold_fixe #c'est une valeur fixe pour calculer le central_bank_reserves sans créer de boucle de calcule qui crer des crash
		value = trade_balance_in_gold
	}

	#########################################
	#dinar
	if = { #export_to_dinar
		limit = {
			not = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_currency
			}
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = export_to_dinar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		every_country = {
			limit = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_currency
				is_valid_country_for_currency_accumulation = yes
			}
			while = {
				count = 5000 #pour etre sure de tout prendre à voir en fin de partie
				limit = {
					market = {
						root.market = {
							not = { market_exports = {  target = prev   value = 0 } }
							market_exports = {
								target = prev
								value >= root.var:export_to_dinar_fix
							}
						}
					}
				}
				root = {
					change_variable = {
						name = export_to_dinar_fix
						add = 1
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	if = { #export_in_dinar
		limit = {
			money_value_dinar > 0.0002
			total_market_exports_quantity > 0
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = export_in_dinar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = export_in_dinar_fix
			add = {
				value = export_to_dinar
				multiply = export_value
				divide = total_market_exports_quantity
				multiply = money_value_target_real_in_gold
				divide = money_value_dinar
			}
		}
	}
	if = { #import_from_dinar
		limit = {
			not = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_currency
				or = {
					# var:currency_crisis = 1
					# var:central_bank_bankruptcy = 1
					has_modifier = central_bank_bankruptcy_country
					has_modifier = currency_crisis_country
				}
			}
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = import_from_dinar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		every_country = {
			limit = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_currency
				not = {
					or = {
						market_owner_is_root_univ_with_buiding = yes
						is_subject_custom_trigger = yes
					}
				}
			}
			while = {
				count = 5000 #pour etre sure de tout prendre à voir en fin de partie
				limit = {
					market = {
						root.market = {
							not = { market_imports = {  target = prev   value = 0 } }
							market_imports = {
								target = prev
								value >= root.var:import_from_dinar_fix
							}
						}
					}
				}
				root = {
					change_variable = {
						name = import_from_dinar_fix
						add = 1
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	if = { #import_in_dinar
		limit = {
			money_value_dinar > 0.0002
			total_market_imports_quantity > 0
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = import_in_dinar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = import_in_dinar_fix
			add = {
				####
				#pdc pour obtenir la quantité de import_value qui est constitué de trade route que représente le dinar
				value = import_from_dinar #nombre de route d'import avec un marché qui a la loi dinar
				multiply = import_value #valeur native de  trade route
				divide = total_market_imports_quantity #nombre total de trade route
				multiply = money_value_dinar #je multipli pas la money value du marché qui export ppour avoir cette valeur en or (car les goods dans un marché par rapport àà unn autre sont comme en or et quant je les compare à un autre marché je  doit les libelé en leur équivalent or)
				#=> donc j'ai la valeur de l'import de ce marché en equivalent or
				####

				divide = money_value_target_real_in_gold #money_value #money_value_rapported_inflation #je divise par mon propre taux à l'or ppour savoir combien de x  currency  je  dois  utilisé pour  acheter cela
			}
		}
	}
	#########################################
	#########################################
	#dinar_algerian_dinar
	if = { #export_to_dinar_algerian_dinar
		limit = {
			not = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_algerian_dinar_currency
			}
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = export_to_dinar_algerian_dinar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		every_country = {
			limit = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_algerian_dinar_currency
				is_valid_country_for_currency_accumulation = yes
			}
			while = {
				count = 5000 #pour etre sure de tout prendre à voir en fin de partie
				limit = {
					market = {
						root.market = {
							not = { market_exports = {  target = prev   value = 0 } }
							market_exports = {
								target = prev
								value >= root.var:export_to_dinar_algerian_dinar_fix
							}
						}
					}
				}
				root = {
					change_variable = {
						name = export_to_dinar_algerian_dinar_fix
						add = 1
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	if = { #export_in_dinar_algerian_dinar
		limit = {
			money_value_dinar_algerian_dinar > 0.0002
			total_market_exports_quantity > 0
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = export_in_dinar_algerian_dinar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = export_in_dinar_algerian_dinar_fix
			add = {
				value = export_to_dinar_algerian_dinar
				multiply = export_value
				divide = total_market_exports_quantity
				multiply = money_value_target_real_in_gold
				divide = money_value_dinar_algerian_dinar
			}
		}
	}
	if = { #import_from_dinar_algerian_dinar
		limit = {
			not = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_algerian_dinar_currency
				or = {
					# var:currency_crisis = 1
					# var:central_bank_bankruptcy = 1
					has_modifier = central_bank_bankruptcy_country
					has_modifier = currency_crisis_country
				}
			}
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = import_from_dinar_algerian_dinar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		every_country = {
			limit = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_algerian_dinar_currency
				not = {
					or = {
						market_owner_is_root_univ_with_buiding = yes
						is_subject_custom_trigger = yes
					}
				}
			}
			while = {
				count = 5000 #pour etre sure de tout prendre à voir en fin de partie
				limit = {
					market = {
						root.market = {
							not = { market_imports = {  target = prev   value = 0 } }
							market_imports = {
								target = prev
								value >= root.var:import_from_dinar_algerian_dinar_fix
							}
						}
					}
				}
				root = {
					change_variable = {
						name = import_from_dinar_algerian_dinar_fix
						add = 1
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	if = { #import_in_dinar_algerian_dinar
		limit = {
			money_value_dinar_algerian_dinar > 0.0002
			total_market_imports_quantity > 0
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = import_in_dinar_algerian_dinar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = import_in_dinar_algerian_dinar_fix
			add = {
				####
				#pdc pour obtenir la quantité de import_value qui est constitué de trade route que représente le dinar_algerian_dinar
				value = import_from_dinar_algerian_dinar #nombre de route d'import avec un marché qui a la loi dinar_algerian_dinar
				multiply = import_value #valeur native de  trade route
				divide = total_market_imports_quantity #nombre total de trade route
				multiply = money_value_dinar_algerian_dinar #je multipli pas la money value du marché qui export ppour avoir cette valeur en or (car les goods dans un marché par rapport àà unn autre sont comme en or et quant je les compare à un autre marché je  doit les libelé en leur équivalent or)
				#=> donc j'ai la valeur de l'import de ce marché en equivalent or
				####

				divide = money_value_target_real_in_gold #money_value #money_value_rapported_inflation #je divise par mon propre taux à l'or ppour savoir combien de x  currency  je  dois  utilisé pour  acheter cela
			}
		}
	}
	#########################################
	#########################################
	#dinar_iraqi_dinar
	if = { #export_to_dinar_iraqi_dinar
		limit = {
			not = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_iraqi_dinar_currency
			}
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = export_to_dinar_iraqi_dinar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		every_country = {
			limit = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_iraqi_dinar_currency
				is_valid_country_for_currency_accumulation = yes
			}
			while = {
				count = 5000 #pour etre sure de tout prendre à voir en fin de partie
				limit = {
					market = {
						root.market = {
							not = { market_exports = {  target = prev   value = 0 } }
							market_exports = {
								target = prev
								value >= root.var:export_to_dinar_iraqi_dinar_fix
							}
						}
					}
				}
				root = {
					change_variable = {
						name = export_to_dinar_iraqi_dinar_fix
						add = 1
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	if = { #export_in_dinar_iraqi_dinar
		limit = {
			money_value_dinar_iraqi_dinar > 0.0002
			total_market_exports_quantity > 0
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = export_in_dinar_iraqi_dinar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = export_in_dinar_iraqi_dinar_fix
			add = {
				value = export_to_dinar_iraqi_dinar
				multiply = export_value
				divide = total_market_exports_quantity
				multiply = money_value_target_real_in_gold
				divide = money_value_dinar_iraqi_dinar
			}
		}
	}
	if = { #import_from_dinar_iraqi_dinar
		limit = {
			not = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_iraqi_dinar_currency
				or = {
					# var:currency_crisis = 1
					# var:central_bank_bankruptcy = 1
					has_modifier = central_bank_bankruptcy_country
					has_modifier = currency_crisis_country
				}
			}
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = import_from_dinar_iraqi_dinar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		every_country = {
			limit = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_iraqi_dinar_currency
				not = {
					or = {
						market_owner_is_root_univ_with_buiding = yes
						is_subject_custom_trigger = yes
					}
				}
			}
			while = {
				count = 5000 #pour etre sure de tout prendre à voir en fin de partie
				limit = {
					market = {
						root.market = {
							not = { market_imports = {  target = prev   value = 0 } }
							market_imports = {
								target = prev
								value >= root.var:import_from_dinar_iraqi_dinar_fix
							}
						}
					}
				}
				root = {
					change_variable = {
						name = import_from_dinar_iraqi_dinar_fix
						add = 1
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	if = { #import_in_dinar_iraqi_dinar
		limit = {
			money_value_dinar_iraqi_dinar > 0.0002
			total_market_imports_quantity > 0
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = import_in_dinar_iraqi_dinar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = import_in_dinar_iraqi_dinar_fix
			add = {
				####
				#pdc pour obtenir la quantité de import_value qui est constitué de trade route que représente le dinar_iraqi_dinar
				value = import_from_dinar_iraqi_dinar #nombre de route d'import avec un marché qui a la loi dinar_iraqi_dinar
				multiply = import_value #valeur native de  trade route
				divide = total_market_imports_quantity #nombre total de trade route
				multiply = money_value_dinar_iraqi_dinar #je multipli pas la money value du marché qui export ppour avoir cette valeur en or (car les goods dans un marché par rapport àà unn autre sont comme en or et quant je les compare à un autre marché je  doit les libelé en leur équivalent or)
				#=> donc j'ai la valeur de l'import de ce marché en equivalent or
				####

				divide = money_value_target_real_in_gold #money_value #money_value_rapported_inflation #je divise par mon propre taux à l'or ppour savoir combien de x  currency  je  dois  utilisé pour  acheter cela
			}
		}
	}
	#########################################
	#########################################
	#dinar_libyan_dinar
	if = { #export_to_dinar_libyan_dinar
		limit = {
			not = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_libyan_dinar_currency
			}
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = export_to_dinar_libyan_dinar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		every_country = {
			limit = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_libyan_dinar_currency
				is_valid_country_for_currency_accumulation = yes
			}
			while = {
				count = 5000 #pour etre sure de tout prendre à voir en fin de partie
				limit = {
					market = {
						root.market = {
							not = { market_exports = {  target = prev   value = 0 } }
							market_exports = {
								target = prev
								value >= root.var:export_to_dinar_libyan_dinar_fix
							}
						}
					}
				}
				root = {
					change_variable = {
						name = export_to_dinar_libyan_dinar_fix
						add = 1
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	if = { #export_in_dinar_libyan_dinar
		limit = {
			money_value_dinar_libyan_dinar > 0.0002
			total_market_exports_quantity > 0
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = export_in_dinar_libyan_dinar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = export_in_dinar_libyan_dinar_fix
			add = {
				value = export_to_dinar_libyan_dinar
				multiply = export_value
				divide = total_market_exports_quantity
				multiply = money_value_target_real_in_gold
				divide = money_value_dinar_libyan_dinar
			}
		}
	}
	if = { #import_from_dinar_libyan_dinar
		limit = {
			not = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_libyan_dinar_currency
				or = {
					# var:currency_crisis = 1
					# var:central_bank_bankruptcy = 1
					has_modifier = central_bank_bankruptcy_country
					has_modifier = currency_crisis_country
				}
			}
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = import_from_dinar_libyan_dinar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		every_country = {
			limit = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_libyan_dinar_currency
				not = {
					or = {
						market_owner_is_root_univ_with_buiding = yes
						is_subject_custom_trigger = yes
					}
				}
			}
			while = {
				count = 5000 #pour etre sure de tout prendre à voir en fin de partie
				limit = {
					market = {
						root.market = {
							not = { market_imports = {  target = prev   value = 0 } }
							market_imports = {
								target = prev
								value >= root.var:import_from_dinar_libyan_dinar_fix
							}
						}
					}
				}
				root = {
					change_variable = {
						name = import_from_dinar_libyan_dinar_fix
						add = 1
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	if = { #import_in_dinar_libyan_dinar
		limit = {
			money_value_dinar_libyan_dinar > 0.0002
			total_market_imports_quantity > 0
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = import_in_dinar_libyan_dinar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = import_in_dinar_libyan_dinar_fix
			add = {
				####
				#pdc pour obtenir la quantité de import_value qui est constitué de trade route que représente le dinar_libyan_dinar
				value = import_from_dinar_libyan_dinar #nombre de route d'import avec un marché qui a la loi dinar_libyan_dinar
				multiply = import_value #valeur native de  trade route
				divide = total_market_imports_quantity #nombre total de trade route
				multiply = money_value_dinar_libyan_dinar #je multipli pas la money value du marché qui export ppour avoir cette valeur en or (car les goods dans un marché par rapport àà unn autre sont comme en or et quant je les compare à un autre marché je  doit les libelé en leur équivalent or)
				#=> donc j'ai la valeur de l'import de ce marché en equivalent or
				####

				divide = money_value_target_real_in_gold #money_value #money_value_rapported_inflation #je divise par mon propre taux à l'or ppour savoir combien de x  currency  je  dois  utilisé pour  acheter cela
			}
		}
	}

		set_variable = {
			name = import_in_dinar_saudi_riyal_fix
			value = 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = import_in_dinar_saudi_riyal_fix
			add = {
				####
				#pdc pour obtenir la quantité de import_value qui est constitué de trade route que représente le dinar_saudi_riyal
				value = import_from_dinar_saudi_riyal #nombre de route d'import avec un marché qui a la loi dinar_saudi_riyal
				multiply = import_value #valeur native de  trade route
				divide = total_market_imports_quantity #nombre total de trade route
				multiply = money_value_dinar_saudi_riyal #je multipli pas la money value du marché qui export ppour avoir cette valeur en or (car les goods dans un marché par rapport àà unn autre sont comme en or et quant je les compare à un autre marché je  doit les libelé en leur équivalent or)
				#=> donc j'ai la valeur de l'import de ce marché en equivalent or
				####

				divide = money_value_target_real_in_gold #money_value #money_value_rapported_inflation #je divise par mon propre taux à l'or ppour savoir combien de x  currency  je  dois  utilisé pour  acheter cela
			}
		}
	}
	#########################################
	#########################################
	#dinar_serbian_dinar
	if = { #export_to_dinar_serbian_dinar
		limit = {
			not = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_serbian_dinar_currency
			}
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = export_to_dinar_serbian_dinar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		every_country = {
			limit = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_serbian_dinar_currency
				is_valid_country_for_currency_accumulation = yes
			}
			while = {
				count = 5000 #pour etre sure de tout prendre à voir en fin de partie
				limit = {
					market = {
						root.market = {
							not = { market_exports = {  target = prev   value = 0 } }
							market_exports = {
								target = prev
								value >= root.var:export_to_dinar_serbian_dinar_fix
							}
						}
					}
				}
				root = {
					change_variable = {
						name = export_to_dinar_serbian_dinar_fix
						add = 1
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	if = { #export_in_dinar_serbian_dinar
		limit = {
			money_value_dinar_serbian_dinar > 0.0002
			total_market_exports_quantity > 0
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = export_in_dinar_serbian_dinar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = export_in_dinar_serbian_dinar_fix
			add = {
				value = export_to_dinar_serbian_dinar
				multiply = export_value
				divide = total_market_exports_quantity
				multiply = money_value_target_real_in_gold
				divide = money_value_dinar_serbian_dinar
			}
		}
	}
	if = { #import_from_dinar_serbian_dinar
		limit = {
			not = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_serbian_dinar_currency
				or = {
					# var:currency_crisis = 1
					# var:central_bank_bankruptcy = 1
					has_modifier = central_bank_bankruptcy_country
					has_modifier = currency_crisis_country
				}
			}
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = import_from_dinar_serbian_dinar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		every_country = {
			limit = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_serbian_dinar_currency
				not = {
					or = {
						market_owner_is_root_univ_with_buiding = yes
						is_subject_custom_trigger = yes
					}
				}
			}
			while = {
				count = 5000 #pour etre sure de tout prendre à voir en fin de partie
				limit = {
					market = {
						root.market = {
							not = { market_imports = {  target = prev   value = 0 } }
							market_imports = {
								target = prev
								value >= root.var:import_from_dinar_serbian_dinar_fix
							}
						}
					}
				}
				root = {
					change_variable = {
						name = import_from_dinar_serbian_dinar_fix
						add = 1
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	if = { #import_in_dinar_serbian_dinar
		limit = {
			money_value_dinar_serbian_dinar > 0.0002
			total_market_imports_quantity > 0
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = import_in_dinar_serbian_dinar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = import_in_dinar_serbian_dinar_fix
			add = {
				####
				#pdc pour obtenir la quantité de import_value qui est constitué de trade route que représente le dinar_serbian_dinar
				value = import_from_dinar_serbian_dinar #nombre de route d'import avec un marché qui a la loi dinar_serbian_dinar
				multiply = import_value #valeur native de  trade route
				divide = total_market_imports_quantity #nombre total de trade route
				multiply = money_value_dinar_serbian_dinar #je multipli pas la money value du marché qui export ppour avoir cette valeur en or (car les goods dans un marché par rapport àà unn autre sont comme en or et quant je les compare à un autre marché je  doit les libelé en leur équivalent or)
				#=> donc j'ai la valeur de l'import de ce marché en equivalent or
				####

				divide = money_value_target_real_in_gold #money_value #money_value_rapported_inflation #je divise par mon propre taux à l'or ppour savoir combien de x  currency  je  dois  utilisé pour  acheter cela
			}
		}
	}

				value = import_from_dollar_canadian_dollar #nombre de route d'import avec un marché qui a la loi dollar_canadian_dollar
				multiply = import_value #valeur native de  trade route
				divide = total_market_imports_quantity #nombre total de trade route
				multiply = money_value_dollar_canadian_dollar #je multipli pas la money value du marché qui export ppour avoir cette valeur en or (car les goods dans un marché par rapport àà unn autre sont comme en or et quant je les compare à un autre marché je  doit les libelé en leur équivalent or)
				#=> donc j'ai la valeur de l'import de ce marché en equivalent or
				####

				divide = money_value_target_real_in_gold #money_value #money_value_rapported_inflation #je divise par mon propre taux à l'or ppour savoir combien de x  currency  je  dois  utilisé pour  acheter cela
			}
		}
	}
	#########################################
	#########################################
	#dollar_caribbean_dollar
	if = { #export_to_dollar_caribbean_dollar
		limit = {
			not = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dollar_caribbean_dollar_currency
			}
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = export_to_dollar_caribbean_dollar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		every_country = {
			limit = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dollar_caribbean_dollar_currency
				is_valid_country_for_currency_accumulation = yes
			}
			while = {
				count = 5000 #pour etre sure de tout prendre à voir en fin de partie
				limit = {
					market = {
						root.market = {
							not = { market_exports = {  target = prev   value = 0 } }
							market_exports = {
								target = prev
								value >= root.var:export_to_dollar_caribbean_dollar_fix
							}
						}
					}
				}
				root = {
					change_variable = {
						name = export_to_dollar_caribbean_dollar_fix
						add = 1
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	if = { #export_in_dollar_caribbean_dollar
		limit = {
			money_value_dollar_caribbean_dollar > 0.0002
			total_market_exports_quantity > 0
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = export_in_dollar_caribbean_dollar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = export_in_dollar_caribbean_dollar_fix
			add = {
				value = export_to_dollar_caribbean_dollar
				multiply = export_value
				divide = total_market_exports_quantity
				multiply = money_value_target_real_in_gold
				divide = money_value_dollar_caribbean_dollar
			}
		}
	}
	if = { #import_from_dollar_caribbean_dollar
		limit = {
			not = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dollar_caribbean_dollar_currency
				or = {
					# var:currency_crisis = 1
					# var:central_bank_bankruptcy = 1
					has_modifier = central_bank_bankruptcy_country
					has_modifier = currency_crisis_country
				}
			}
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = import_from_dollar_caribbean_dollar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		every_country = {
			limit = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dollar_caribbean_dollar_currency
				not = {
					or = {
						market_owner_is_root_univ_with_buiding = yes
						is_subject_custom_trigger = yes
					}
				}
			}
			while = {
				count = 5000 #pour etre sure de tout prendre à voir en fin de partie
				limit = {
					market = {
						root.market = {
							not = { market_imports = {  target = prev   value = 0 } }
							market_imports = {
								target = prev
								value >= root.var:import_from_dollar_caribbean_dollar_fix
							}
						}
					}
				}
				root = {
					change_variable = {
						name = import_from_dollar_caribbean_dollar_fix
						add = 1
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	if = { #import_in_dollar_caribbean_dollar
		limit = {
			money_value_dollar_caribbean_dollar > 0.0002
			total_market_imports_quantity > 0
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = import_in_dollar_caribbean_dollar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = import_in_dollar_caribbean_dollar_fix
			add = {
				####
				#pdc pour obtenir la quantité de import_value qui est constitué de trade route que représente le dollar_caribbean_dollar
				value = import_from_dollar_caribbean_dollar #nombre de route d'import avec un marché qui a la loi dollar_caribbean_dollar
				multiply = import_value #valeur native de  trade route
				divide = total_market_imports_quantity #nombre total de trade route
				multiply = money_value_dollar_caribbean_dollar #je multipli pas la money value du marché qui export ppour avoir cette valeur en or (car les goods dans un marché par rapport àà unn autre sont comme en or et quant je les compare à un autre marché je  doit les libelé en leur équivalent or)
				#=> donc j'ai la valeur de l'import de ce marché en equivalent or
				####

				divide = money_value_target_real_in_gold #money_value #money_value_rapported_inflation #je divise par mon propre taux à l'or ppour savoir combien de x  currency  je  dois  utilisé pour  acheter cela
			}
		}
	}
	#########################################
	#########################################

				#=> donc j'ai la valeur de l'import de ce marché en equivalent or
				####

				divide = money_value_target_real_in_gold #money_value #money_value_rapported_inflation #je divise par mon propre taux à l'or ppour savoir combien de x  currency  je  dois  utilisé pour  acheter cela
			}
		}
	}
	#########################################
	#########################################
	#dollar_united_states_dollar
	if = { #export_to_dollar_united_states_dollar
		limit = {
			not = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dollar_united_states_dollar_currency
			}
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = export_to_dollar_united_states_dollar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		every_country = {
			limit = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dollar_united_states_dollar_currency
				is_valid_country_for_currency_accumulation = yes
			}
			while = {
				count = 5000 #pour etre sure de tout prendre à voir en fin de partie
				limit = {
					market = {
						root.market = {
							not = { market_exports = {  target = prev   value = 0 } }
							market_exports = {
								target = prev
								value >= root.var:export_to_dollar_united_states_dollar_fix
							}
						}
					}
				}
				root = {
					change_variable = {
						name = export_to_dollar_united_states_dollar_fix
						add = 1
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	if = { #export_in_dollar_united_states_dollar
		limit = {
			money_value_dollar_united_states_dollar > 0.0002
			total_market_exports_quantity > 0
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = export_in_dollar_united_states_dollar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = export_in_dollar_united_states_dollar_fix
			add = {
				value = export_to_dollar_united_states_dollar
				multiply = export_value
				divide = total_market_exports_quantity
				multiply = money_value_target_real_in_gold
				divide = money_value_dollar_united_states_dollar
			}
		}
	}
	if = { #import_from_dollar_united_states_dollar
		limit = {
			not = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dollar_united_states_dollar_currency
				or = {
					# var:currency_crisis = 1
					# var:central_bank_bankruptcy = 1
					has_modifier = central_bank_bankruptcy_country
					has_modifier = currency_crisis_country
				}
			}
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = import_from_dollar_united_states_dollar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		every_country = {
			limit = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dollar_united_states_dollar_currency
				not = {
					or = {
						market_owner_is_root_univ_with_buiding = yes
						is_subject_custom_trigger = yes
					}
				}
			}
			while = {
				count = 5000 #pour etre sure de tout prendre à voir en fin de partie
				limit = {
					market = {
						root.market = {
							not = { market_imports = {  target = prev   value = 0 } }
							market_imports = {
								target = prev
								value >= root.var:import_from_dollar_united_states_dollar_fix
							}
						}
					}
				}
				root = {
					change_variable = {
						name = import_from_dollar_united_states_dollar_fix
						add = 1
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	if = { #import_in_dollar_united_states_dollar
		limit = {
			money_value_dollar_united_states_dollar > 0.0002
			total_market_imports_quantity > 0
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = import_in_dollar_united_states_dollar_fix
			value = 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = import_in_dollar_united_states_dollar_fix
			add = {
				####
				#pdc pour obtenir la quantité de import_value qui est constitué de trade route que représente le dollar_united_states_dollar
				value = import_from_dollar_united_states_dollar #nombre de route d'import avec un marché qui a la loi dollar_united_states_dollar
				multiply = import_value #valeur native de  trade route
				divide = total_market_imports_quantity #nombre total de trade route
				multiply = money_value_dollar_united_states_dollar #je multipli pas la money value du marché qui export ppour avoir cette valeur en or (car les goods dans un marché par rapport àà unn autre sont comme en or et quant je les compare à un autre marché je  doit les libelé en leur équivalent or)
				#=> donc j'ai la valeur de l'import de ce marché en equivalent or
				####

				divide = money_value_target_real_in_gold #money_value #money_value_rapported_inflation #je divise par mon propre taux à l'or ppour savoir combien de x  currency  je  dois  utilisé pour  acheter cela
			}
		}
	}

				multiply = money_value_eco_ariary #je multipli pas la money value du marché qui export ppour avoir cette valeur en or (car les goods dans un marché par rapport àà unn autre sont comme en or et quant je les compare à un autre marché je  doit les libelé en leur équivalent or)
