    #thaler_hannoveraner_thaler
	buy_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_currency = {

		#scope:
		root = {
			save_scope_as = buyer
			every_scope_state = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						is_capital = yes
					}
					save_scope_as = central_bank_site
				}
			}
		}
		random_in_global_list = {
			variable = thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_currency_law_list_ordered_1 #overrated_currency_list
			save_scope_as = undervalued_currency_country_owner
			every_scope_state = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						is_capital = yes
					}
					save_scope_as = central_bank_site_seller
				}
			}
		}

		#reset_purchase_cycle
		set_variable = {
			name = purchase_cycle
			value = 0
		}
		#mecha
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner
				scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner = {
					has_law = law_type:law_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_currency
					buy_currency_1 = yes
				}
			}

			scope:buyer = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						not  = {
							has_law = law_type:law_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_currency
						}
					}
					set_variable = {
						name = thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_quantity_var
						value = { 1000000 10000000 }
					}
					set_variable = {
						name = stockpiling_undervalued_quantity_var
						value = var:thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_quantity_var
					}

					set_variable = {
						name = stockpiling_undervalued_currency_state_1_buyer_in_metal
						value = {
							value = 1
							add = var:stockpiling_undervalued_quantity_var
							multiply = scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner.money_value_target_real #money_value
						}
					}

					#gold
					if = {
						limit = {
							law_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_monetary_system_GS_GES_trigger = yes
							var:stockpiling_undervalued_currency_state_1_buyer_in_metal < gold_state_native_for_stockpile
							scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner.stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_state > var:stockpiling_undervalued_quantity_var
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_seller = {
							#metal
							change_variable = {
								name = gold_state_1
								add = scope:buyer.var:stockpiling_undervalued_currency_state_1_buyer_in_metal

							}
							change_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_state_1
								subtract = scope:buyer.var:stockpiling_undervalued_quantity_var
							}
						}
						scope:central_bank_site = {
							scope:central_bank_site = {
								#metal
								change_variable = {
									name = gold_state_1
									subtract = owner.var:stockpiling_undervalued_currency_state_1_buyer_in_metal

								}
								change_variable = {
									name = stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_state_1
									add = owner.var:stockpiling_undervalued_quantity_var
								}
							}
						}
						#notification
						every_country = {
							limit  = {
								is_player = yes
							}
							save_scope_as = is_player_for_notification
						}
						if = {
							limit = {
								scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner = scope:is_player_for_notification
							}
							scope:is_player_for_notification = {
								post_notification = your_currency_are_buy_message
							}
						}
						set_variable = {
							name = purchase_cycle
							value = 1
						}
					}

					#silver
					if = {
						limit = {
							law_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_monetary_system_SS_BS_trigger = yes
							var:stockpiling_undervalued_currency_state_1_buyer_in_metal < silver_state_native_for_stockpile
							scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner.stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_state > var:stockpiling_undervalued_quantity_var
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_seller = {
							#metal
							change_variable = {
								name = silver_state_1
								add = scope:buyer.var:stockpiling_undervalued_currency_state_1_buyer_in_metal
							}
							change_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_state_1
								subtract = scope:buyer.var:stockpiling_undervalued_quantity_var
							}
						}
						scope:central_bank_site = {
							scope:central_bank_site = {
								#metal
								change_variable = {
									name = silver_state_1
									subtract = owner.var:stockpiling_undervalued_currency_state_1_buyer_in_metal
								}
								change_variable = {
									name = stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_state_1
									add = owner.var:stockpiling_undervalued_quantity_var
								}
							}
						}
						#notification
						every_country = {
							limit  = {
								is_player = yes
							}
							save_scope_as = is_player_for_notification
						}
						if = {
							limit = {
								scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner = scope:is_player_for_notification
							}
							scope:is_player_for_notification = {
								post_notification = your_currency_are_buy_message
							}
						}
						set_variable = {
							name = purchase_cycle
							value = 1
						}
					}

				}
			}
		}
	}
	sell_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_currency = {

		#scope:
		root = {
			save_scope_as = seller_root
			every_scope_state = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						is_capital = yes
					}
					save_scope_as = central_bank_site_root
				}
			}
		}
		random_in_global_list = {
			variable = thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_currency_law_list_ordered_1 #overrated_currency_list
			save_scope_as = overrated_currency_country_owner
			every_scope_state = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						is_capital = yes
					}
					save_scope_as = central_bank_site_overrated_currency_owner
				}
			}
		}

		#mecha
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = scope:overrated_currency_country_owner
				scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = {
					has_law = law_type:law_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_currency
					sell_currency_1 = yes
				}
			}

			scope:seller_root = {
				set_variable = {
					name = thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_quantity_var
					value = stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_state
				}
				set_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
					value = var:thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_quantity_var
				}
				change_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
					multiply = 0.5
				}
				set_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal
					value = {
						value = 1
						add = var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
						multiply = scope:overrated_currency_country_owner.money_value_target_real #money_value
					}
				}

				#gold
				if = {
					limit = {
						law_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_monetary_system_GS_GES_trigger = yes
						scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = { #verifit si la reserve d'or du pays avec la devise sur évalué est superieur à ce qu'elle doit
							scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal < gold_state_native_for_stockpile
						}
					}
					scope:central_bank_site_root = {
						#metal
						change_variable = {
							name = gold_state_1
							add = owner.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal
						}
					}

					#currency
					change_variable = {
						name = stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
						subtract = owner.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							var:stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency < 0
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_root = {
							change_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_state_1
								add = PREV.var:stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							owner.var:stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency = 0
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_root = {
							change_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_state_1
								subtract = owner.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
							}
						}
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							var:stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency < 0
						}
						set_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							value = 0
						}
					}
					if = { #actualise la variable
						limit = {
							not  = {
								scope:central_bank_site_root.var:stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1 = var:stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_root = {
							set_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1
								value = PREV.var:stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
					}
					#notification
					every_country = {
						limit  = {
							is_player = yes
						}
						save_scope_as = is_player_for_notification
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = scope:is_player_for_notification
						}
						scope:is_player_for_notification = {
							post_notification = your_currency_are_sell_message
						}
					}
				}

				#silver
				if = {
					limit = {
						law_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_monetary_system_SS_BS_trigger = yes
						scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = { #verifit si la reserve d'or du pays avec la devise sur évalué est superieur à ce qu'elle doit

						}
					}
					scope:central_bank_site_root = {
						#metal
						change_variable = {
							name = silver_state_1
							add = owner.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal
						}
					}

					#currency
					change_variable = {
						name = stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
						subtract = owner.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
					}
					if = {

							var:stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency < 0
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_root = {
							change_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_state_1
								add = PREV.var:stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							owner.var:stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency = 0
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_root = {
							change_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_state_1
								subtract = owner.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
							}
						}
					}
					if = {

						}

							value = 0

						limit = {

	sell_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_currency_crisis = {

		#scope:
		scope:seller = {
			save_scope_as = seller_root
			every_scope_state = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						is_capital = yes
					}
					save_scope_as = central_bank_site_root
				}
			}
		}
		scope:target_country = {
			save_scope_as = overrated_currency_country_owner
			every_scope_state = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						is_capital = yes
					}
					save_scope_as = central_bank_site_overrated_currency_owner
				}
			}
		}

		#mecha
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = scope:overrated_currency_country_owner
				scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = {
					has_law = law_type:law_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_currency
					sell_currency_crisis_1 = yes
				}
			}

			scope:seller_root = {
				set_variable = {
					name = thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_quantity_var
					value = stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_state
				}
				set_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
					value = var:thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_quantity_var
				}

				set_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal
					value = {
						value = 1
						add = var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
						multiply = scope:overrated_currency_country_owner.money_value_target_real #money_value
					}
				}

				#gold
				if = {
					limit = {
						law_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_monetary_system_GS_GES_trigger = yes
					}
					# scope:central_bank_site_root = {
					# 	#metal
					# 	change_variable = {
					# 		name = gold_state_1
					# 		add = owner.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal
					# 	}
					# }

					if = {
						limit = {
							var:stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency > 0
						}
						set_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							value = 0
						}
					}
					scope:central_bank_site_root = {
						set_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_state_1
							value = 0
						}
					}

					if = { #actualise la variable
						limit = {
							not  = {
								scope:central_bank_site_root.var:stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1 = var:stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_root = {
							set_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1
								value = PREV.var:stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
					}
					#notification
					every_country = {
						limit  = {
							is_player = yes
						}
						save_scope_as = is_player_for_notification
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = scope:is_player_for_notification
						}
						scope:is_player_for_notification = {
							post_notification = unstable_currency_message
						}
					}
				}

				#silver
				if = {
					limit = {
						law_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_monetary_system_SS_BS_trigger = yes
					}
					# scope:central_bank_site_root = {
					# 	#metal
					# 	change_variable = {
					# 		name = silver_state_1
					# 		add = owner.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal
					# 	}
					# }

					if = {
						limit = {
							var:stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency > 0
						}
						set_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							value = 0
						}
					}
					scope:central_bank_site_root = {
						set_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_state_1
							value = 0
						}
					}

					if = { #actualise la variable
						limit = {
							not  = {
								scope:central_bank_site_root.var:stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1 = var:stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_root = {
							set_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1
								value = PREV.var:stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
					}
					#notification
					every_country = {
						limit  = {
							is_player = yes
						}
						save_scope_as = is_player_for_notification

					if = {
						limit = {
							scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = scope:is_player_for_notification
						}
						scope:is_player_for_notification = {
							post_notification = unstable_currency_message
						}
					}
				}

				#fiat
				if = {
					limit = {
						law_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_monetary_system_FS_trigger = yes
					}

					if = {
						limit = {
							var:stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency > 0
						}
						set_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							value = 0
						}
					}
					scope:central_bank_site_root = {
						set_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_state_1
							value = 0
						}
					}

					if = { #actualise la variable
						limit = {
							not  = {
								scope:central_bank_site_root.var:stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1 = var:stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_root = {
							set_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1
								value = PREV.var:stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
					}

					}
					if = {

						}

						}
						scope:central_bank_site_overrated_currency_owner = {
							set_variable = {

								value = 0
							}

							# 	name = stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_state_1
							# 	add = scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
							# }
						}
					}
					#silver
					if = {

							}

							# 	add = scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
							# }

    #thaler_prussian_thaler
	buy_thaler_prussian_thaler_currency = {

		#scope:
		root = {
			save_scope_as = buyer
			every_scope_state = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						is_capital = yes
					}
					save_scope_as = central_bank_site
				}
			}
		}
		random_in_global_list = {
			variable = thaler_prussian_thaler_currency_law_list_ordered_1 #overrated_currency_list
			save_scope_as = undervalued_currency_country_owner
			every_scope_state = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						is_capital = yes
					}
					save_scope_as = central_bank_site_seller
				}
			}
		}

		#reset_purchase_cycle
		set_variable = {
			name = purchase_cycle
			value = 0
		}
		#mecha
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner
				scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner = {
					has_law = law_type:law_thaler_prussian_thaler_currency
					buy_currency_1 = yes
				}
			}

			scope:buyer = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						not  = {
							has_law = law_type:law_thaler_prussian_thaler_currency
						}
					}
					set_variable = {
						name = thaler_prussian_thaler_quantity_var
						value = { 1000000 10000000 }
					}
					set_variable = {
						name = stockpiling_undervalued_quantity_var
						value = var:thaler_prussian_thaler_quantity_var
					}

					set_variable = {
						name = stockpiling_undervalued_currency_state_1_buyer_in_metal
						value = {
							value = 1
							add = var:stockpiling_undervalued_quantity_var
							multiply = scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner.money_value_target_real #money_value
						}
					}

					#gold
					if = {
						limit = {
							law_thaler_prussian_thaler_monetary_system_GS_GES_trigger = yes
							var:stockpiling_undervalued_currency_state_1_buyer_in_metal < gold_state_native_for_stockpile
							scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner.stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_state > var:stockpiling_undervalued_quantity_var
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_seller = {
							#metal
							change_variable = {
								name = gold_state_1
								add = scope:buyer.var:stockpiling_undervalued_currency_state_1_buyer_in_metal

							}
							change_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_state_1
								subtract = scope:buyer.var:stockpiling_undervalued_quantity_var
							}
						}
						scope:central_bank_site = {
							scope:central_bank_site = {
								#metal
								change_variable = {
									name = gold_state_1
									subtract = owner.var:stockpiling_undervalued_currency_state_1_buyer_in_metal

								}
								change_variable = {
									name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_state_1
									add = owner.var:stockpiling_undervalued_quantity_var
								}
							}
						}
						#notification
						every_country = {
							limit  = {
								is_player = yes
							}
							save_scope_as = is_player_for_notification
						}
						if = {
							limit = {
								scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner = scope:is_player_for_notification
							}
							scope:is_player_for_notification = {
								post_notification = your_currency_are_buy_message
							}
						}
						set_variable = {
							name = purchase_cycle
							value = 1
						}
					}

					#silver
					if = {
						limit = {
							law_thaler_prussian_thaler_monetary_system_SS_BS_trigger = yes
							var:stockpiling_undervalued_currency_state_1_buyer_in_metal < silver_state_native_for_stockpile
							scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner.stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_state > var:stockpiling_undervalued_quantity_var
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_seller = {
							#metal
							change_variable = {
								name = silver_state_1
								add = scope:buyer.var:stockpiling_undervalued_currency_state_1_buyer_in_metal
							}
							change_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_state_1
								subtract = scope:buyer.var:stockpiling_undervalued_quantity_var
							}
						}
						scope:central_bank_site = {
							scope:central_bank_site = {
								#metal
								change_variable = {
									name = silver_state_1
									subtract = owner.var:stockpiling_undervalued_currency_state_1_buyer_in_metal
								}
								change_variable = {
									name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_state_1
									add = owner.var:stockpiling_undervalued_quantity_var
								}
							}
						}
						#notification
						every_country = {
							limit  = {
								is_player = yes
							}
							save_scope_as = is_player_for_notification
						}
						if = {
							limit = {
								scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner = scope:is_player_for_notification
							}
							scope:is_player_for_notification = {
								post_notification = your_currency_are_buy_message
							}
						}
						set_variable = {
							name = purchase_cycle
							value = 1
						}
					}

				}
			}
		}
	}
	sell_thaler_prussian_thaler_currency = {

		#scope:
		root = {
			save_scope_as = seller_root
			every_scope_state = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						is_capital = yes
					}
					save_scope_as = central_bank_site_root
				}
			}
		}
		random_in_global_list = {
			variable = thaler_prussian_thaler_currency_law_list_ordered_1 #overrated_currency_list
			save_scope_as = overrated_currency_country_owner
			every_scope_state = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						is_capital = yes
					}
					save_scope_as = central_bank_site_overrated_currency_owner
				}
			}
		}

		#mecha
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = scope:overrated_currency_country_owner
				scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = {
					has_law = law_type:law_thaler_prussian_thaler_currency
					sell_currency_1 = yes
				}
			}

			scope:seller_root = {
				set_variable = {
					name = thaler_prussian_thaler_quantity_var
					value = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_state
				}
				set_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
					value = var:thaler_prussian_thaler_quantity_var
				}
				change_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
					multiply = 0.5
				}
				set_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal
					value = {
						value = 1
						add = var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
						multiply = scope:overrated_currency_country_owner.money_value_target_real #money_value
					}
				}

				#gold
				if = {
					limit = {
						law_thaler_prussian_thaler_monetary_system_GS_GES_trigger = yes
						scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = { #verifit si la reserve d'or du pays avec la devise sur évalué est superieur à ce qu'elle doit
							scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal < gold_state_native_for_stockpile
						}
					}
					scope:central_bank_site_root = {
						#metal
						change_variable = {
							name = gold_state_1
							add = owner.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal
						}
					}

					#currency
					change_variable = {
						name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
						subtract = owner.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							var:stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency < 0
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_root = {
							change_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_state_1
								add = PREV.var:stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							owner.var:stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency = 0
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_root = {
							change_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_state_1
								subtract = owner.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
							}
						}
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							var:stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency < 0
						}
						set_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							value = 0
						}
					}
					if = { #actualise la variable
						limit = {
							not  = {
								scope:central_bank_site_root.var:stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1 = var:stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_root = {
							set_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1
								value = PREV.var:stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
					}
					#notification
					every_country = {
						limit  = {
							is_player = yes
						}
						save_scope_as = is_player_for_notification
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = scope:is_player_for_notification
						}
						scope:is_player_for_notification = {
							post_notification = your_currency_are_sell_message
						}
					}
				}

				#silver
				if = {
					limit = {
						law_thaler_prussian_thaler_monetary_system_SS_BS_trigger = yes
						scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = { #verifit si la reserve d'or du pays avec la devise sur évalué est superieur à ce qu'elle doit
							scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal < silver_state_native_for_stockpile
						}
					}
					scope:central_bank_site_root = {
						#metal
						change_variable = {
							name = silver_state_1
							add = owner.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal
						}
					}

					#currency
					change_variable = {
						name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
						subtract = owner.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							var:stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency < 0
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_root = {
							change_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_state_1
								add = PREV.var:stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							owner.var:stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency = 0
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_root = {
							change_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_state_1
								subtract = owner.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
							}
						}
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							var:stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency < 0
						}
						set_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							value = 0
						}
					}
					if = { #actualise la variable
						limit = {
							not  = {
								scope:central_bank_site_root.var:stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1 = var:stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_root = {
							set_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1
								value = PREV.var:stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
					}
					#notification
					every_country = {
						limit  = {
							is_player = yes
						}
						save_scope_as = is_player_for_notification
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = scope:is_player_for_notification
						}
						scope:is_player_for_notification = {
							post_notification = your_currency_are_sell_message
						}
					}
				}
				scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = {
					#gold
					if = {
						limit = {
							law_thaler_prussian_thaler_monetary_system_GS_GES_trigger = yes
							scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal < gold_state_native_for_stockpile
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_overrated_currency_owner = {
							change_variable = {
								name = gold_state_1
								subtract = scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal
							}
							change_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_state_1
								add = scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
							}
						}
					}
					#silver
					if = {
						limit = {
							law_thaler_prussian_thaler_monetary_system_SS_BS_trigger = yes
							scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal < silver_state_native_for_stockpile
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_overrated_currency_owner = {
							change_variable = {
								name = silver_state_1
								subtract = scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal
							}
							change_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_state_1
								add = scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
							}
						}

						set_variable = {
							name = test_var_4
							value = scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal
						}

					}
					reset_debt_in_national_currency = yes
				}
			}
		}

	sell_thaler_prussian_thaler_currency_crisis = {

		#scope:
		scope:seller = {
			save_scope_as = seller_root
			every_scope_state = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						is_capital = yes
					}
					save_scope_as = central_bank_site_root
				}
			}
		}
		scope:target_country = {
			save_scope_as = overrated_currency_country_owner
			every_scope_state = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						is_capital = yes
					}
					save_scope_as = central_bank_site_overrated_currency_owner
				}
			}
		}

		#mecha
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = scope:overrated_currency_country_owner
				scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = {
					has_law = law_type:law_thaler_prussian_thaler_currency
					sell_currency_crisis_1 = yes
				}
			}

			scope:seller_root = {
				set_variable = {
					name = thaler_prussian_thaler_quantity_var
					value = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_state
				}
				set_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
					value = var:thaler_prussian_thaler_quantity_var
				}

				set_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal
					value = {
						value = 1
						add = var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
						multiply = scope:overrated_currency_country_owner.money_value_target_real #money_value
					}
				}

				#gold
				if = {
					limit = {
						law_thaler_prussian_thaler_monetary_system_GS_GES_trigger = yes
					}
					# scope:central_bank_site_root = {
					# 	#metal
					# 	change_variable = {
					# 		name = gold_state_1
					# 		add = owner.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal
					# 	}
					# }

					if = {
						limit = {
							var:stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency > 0
						}
						set_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							value = 0
						}
					}
					scope:central_bank_site_root = {
						set_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_state_1
							value = 0
						}
					}

					if = { #actualise la variable
						limit = {
							not  = {
								scope:central_bank_site_root.var:stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1 = var:stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_root = {
							set_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1
								value = PREV.var:stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
					}
					#notification
					every_country = {
						limit  = {
							is_player = yes
						}
						save_scope_as = is_player_for_notification
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = scope:is_player_for_notification
						}
						scope:is_player_for_notification = {
							post_notification = unstable_currency_message
						}
					}
				}

				#silver
				if = {
					limit = {
						law_thaler_prussian_thaler_monetary_system_SS_BS_trigger = yes
					}
					# scope:central_bank_site_root = {
					# 	#metal
					# 	change_variable = {
					# 		name = silver_state_1
					# 		add = owner.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal
					# 	}
					# }

					if = {
						limit = {
							var:stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency > 0
						}
						set_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							value = 0
						}
					}
					scope:central_bank_site_root = {
						set_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_state_1
							value = 0
						}
					}

					if = { #actualise la variable
						limit = {
							not  = {
								scope:central_bank_site_root.var:stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1 = var:stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_root = {
							set_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1
								value = PREV.var:stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
					}
					#notification
					every_country = {
						limit  = {
							is_player = yes
						}
						save_scope_as = is_player_for_notification
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = scope:is_player_for_notification
						}
						scope:is_player_for_notification = {
							post_notification = unstable_currency_message
						}
					}
				}

				#fiat
				if = {
					limit = {
						law_thaler_prussian_thaler_monetary_system_FS_trigger = yes
					}

					if = {
						limit = {
							var:stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency > 0
						}
						set_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							value = 0
						}
					}
					scope:central_bank_site_root = {
						set_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_state_1
							value = 0
						}
					}

					if = { #actualise la variable
						limit = {
							not  = {
								scope:central_bank_site_root.var:stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1 = var:stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_root = {
							set_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1
								value = PREV.var:stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
					}
					#notification
					every_country = {
						limit  = {
							is_player = yes
						}
						save_scope_as = is_player_for_notification
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = scope:is_player_for_notification
						}
						scope:is_player_for_notification = {
							post_notification = unstable_currency_message
						}
					}
				}
				scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = {
					#gold
					if = {
						limit = {
							law_thaler_prussian_thaler_monetary_system_GS_GES_trigger = yes
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_overrated_currency_owner = {
							set_variable = {
								name = gold_state_1
								value = 0
							}
							# change_variable = {
							# 	name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_state_1
							# 	add = scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
							# }
						}
					}
					#silver
					if = {
						limit = {
							law_thaler_prussian_thaler_monetary_system_SS_BS_trigger = yes
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_overrated_currency_owner = {
							set_variable = {

							# change_variable = {

							# 	add = scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
							# }
						}
					}
					#fiat
					if = {
						limit = {
							law_thaler_prussian_thaler_monetary_system_FS_trigger = yes
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_overrated_currency_owner = {

								name = gold_state_1
								value = 0
							}

    #thaler_saxon_thaler
	buy_thaler_saxon_thaler_currency = {

		#scope:
		root = {
			save_scope_as = buyer
			every_scope_state = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						is_capital = yes
					}
					save_scope_as = central_bank_site
				}
			}
		}
		random_in_global_list = {
			variable = thaler_saxon_thaler_currency_law_list_ordered_1 #overrated_currency_list
			save_scope_as = undervalued_currency_country_owner
			every_scope_state = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						is_capital = yes
					}
					save_scope_as = central_bank_site_seller
				}
			}
		}

		#reset_purchase_cycle
		set_variable = {
			name = purchase_cycle
			value = 0
		}
		#mecha
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner
				scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner = {
					has_law = law_type:law_thaler_saxon_thaler_currency
					buy_currency_1 = yes
				}
			}

			scope:buyer = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						not  = {
							has_law = law_type:law_thaler_saxon_thaler_currency
						}
					}
					set_variable = {
						name = thaler_saxon_thaler_quantity_var
						value = { 1000000 10000000 }
					}
					set_variable = {
						name = stockpiling_undervalued_quantity_var
						value = var:thaler_saxon_thaler_quantity_var
					}

					set_variable = {
						name = stockpiling_undervalued_currency_state_1_buyer_in_metal
						value = {
							value = 1
							add = var:stockpiling_undervalued_quantity_var
							multiply = scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner.money_value_target_real #money_value
						}
					}

					#gold
					if = {
						limit = {
							law_thaler_saxon_thaler_monetary_system_GS_GES_trigger = yes
							var:stockpiling_undervalued_currency_state_1_buyer_in_metal < gold_state_native_for_stockpile
							scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner.stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_state > var:stockpiling_undervalued_quantity_var
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_seller = {
							#metal
							change_variable = {
								name = gold_state_1
								add = scope:buyer.var:stockpiling_undervalued_currency_state_1_buyer_in_metal

							}
							change_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_state_1
								subtract = scope:buyer.var:stockpiling_undervalued_quantity_var
							}
						}
						scope:central_bank_site = {
							scope:central_bank_site = {
								#metal
								change_variable = {
									name = gold_state_1
									subtract = owner.var:stockpiling_undervalued_currency_state_1_buyer_in_metal

								}
								change_variable = {
									name = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_state_1
									add = owner.var:stockpiling_undervalued_quantity_var
								}
							}
						}
						#notification
						every_country = {
							limit  = {
								is_player = yes
							}
							save_scope_as = is_player_for_notification
						}
						if = {
							limit = {
								scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner = scope:is_player_for_notification
							}
							scope:is_player_for_notification = {
								post_notification = your_currency_are_buy_message
							}
						}
						set_variable = {
							name = purchase_cycle
							value = 1
						}
					}

					#silver
					if = {
						limit = {
							law_thaler_saxon_thaler_monetary_system_SS_BS_trigger = yes
							var:stockpiling_undervalued_currency_state_1_buyer_in_metal < silver_state_native_for_stockpile
							scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner.stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_state > var:stockpiling_undervalued_quantity_var
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_seller = {
							#metal
							change_variable = {
								name = silver_state_1
								add = scope:buyer.var:stockpiling_undervalued_currency_state_1_buyer_in_metal
							}
							change_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_state_1
								subtract = scope:buyer.var:stockpiling_undervalued_quantity_var
							}
						}
						scope:central_bank_site = {
							scope:central_bank_site = {
								#metal
								change_variable = {
									name = silver_state_1
									subtract = owner.var:stockpiling_undervalued_currency_state_1_buyer_in_metal
								}
								change_variable = {
									name = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_state_1
									add = owner.var:stockpiling_undervalued_quantity_var
								}
							}
						}
						#notification
						every_country = {
							limit  = {
								is_player = yes
							}
							save_scope_as = is_player_for_notification
						}
						if = {
							limit = {
								scope:undervalued_currency_country_owner = scope:is_player_for_notification
							}
							scope:is_player_for_notification = {
								post_notification = your_currency_are_buy_message
							}
						}
						set_variable = {
							name = purchase_cycle
							value = 1
						}
					}

				}
			}
		}

	sell_thaler_saxon_thaler_currency = {

		#scope:
		root = {
			save_scope_as = seller_root
			every_scope_state = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						is_capital = yes
					}
					save_scope_as = central_bank_site_root
				}
			}
		}
		random_in_global_list = {
			variable = thaler_saxon_thaler_currency_law_list_ordered_1 #overrated_currency_list
			save_scope_as = overrated_currency_country_owner
			every_scope_state = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						is_capital = yes
					}
					save_scope_as = central_bank_site_overrated_currency_owner
				}
			}
		}

		#mecha
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = scope:overrated_currency_country_owner
				scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = {
					has_law = law_type:law_thaler_saxon_thaler_currency
					sell_currency_1 = yes
				}
			}

			scope:seller_root = {
				set_variable = {
					name = thaler_saxon_thaler_quantity_var
					value = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_state
				}
				set_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
					value = var:thaler_saxon_thaler_quantity_var
				}
				change_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
					multiply = 0.5
				}
				set_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal
					value = {
						value = 1
						add = var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
						multiply = scope:overrated_currency_country_owner.money_value_target_real #money_value
					}
				}

				#gold
				if = {
					limit = {
						law_thaler_saxon_thaler_monetary_system_GS_GES_trigger = yes
						scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = { #verifit si la reserve d'or du pays avec la devise sur évalué est superieur à ce qu'elle doit
							scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal < gold_state_native_for_stockpile
						}
					}
					scope:central_bank_site_root = {
						#metal
						change_variable = {
							name = gold_state_1
							add = owner.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal
						}
					}

					#currency
					change_variable = {
						name = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
						subtract = owner.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							var:stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency < 0
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_root = {
							change_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_state_1
								add = PREV.var:stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							owner.var:stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency = 0
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_root = {
							change_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_state_1
								subtract = owner.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
							}
						}
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							var:stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency < 0
						}
						set_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							value = 0
						}
					}
					if = { #actualise la variable
						limit = {
							not  = {
								scope:central_bank_site_root.var:stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1 = var:stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_root = {
							set_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1
								value = PREV.var:stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
					}
					#notification
					every_country = {
						limit  = {
							is_player = yes
						}
						save_scope_as = is_player_for_notification
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = scope:is_player_for_notification
						}
						scope:is_player_for_notification = {
							post_notification = your_currency_are_sell_message
						}
					}
				}

				#silver
				if = {
					limit = {
						law_thaler_saxon_thaler_monetary_system_SS_BS_trigger = yes
						scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = { #verifit si la reserve d'or du pays avec la devise sur évalué est superieur à ce qu'elle doit
							scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal < silver_state_native_for_stockpile
						}
					}
					scope:central_bank_site_root = {
						#metal
						change_variable = {
							name = silver_state_1
							add = owner.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal
						}
					}

					#currency
					change_variable = {
						name = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
						subtract = owner.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							var:stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency < 0
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_root = {
							change_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_state_1
								add = PREV.var:stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							owner.var:stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency = 0
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_root = {
							change_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_state_1
								subtract = owner.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
							}
						}
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							var:stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency < 0
						}
						set_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							value = 0
						}
					}
					if = { #actualise la variable
						limit = {
							not  = {
								scope:central_bank_site_root.var:stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1 = var:stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_root = {
							set_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1
								value = PREV.var:stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}

						}
						scope:is_player_for_notification = {
							post_notification = your_currency_are_sell_message
						}
					}
				}
				scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = {
					#gold
					if = {
						limit = {
							law_thaler_saxon_thaler_monetary_system_GS_GES_trigger = yes
							scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal < gold_state_native_for_stockpile
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_overrated_currency_owner = {
							change_variable = {
								name = gold_state_1
								subtract = scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal
							}
							change_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_state_1

							}

					#silver
					if = {

							law_thaler_saxon_thaler_monetary_system_SS_BS_trigger = yes
							scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal < silver_state_native_for_stockpile

						scope:central_bank_site_overrated_currency_owner = {
							change_variable = {
								name = silver_state_1
								subtract = scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal
							}
							change_variable = {

							value = scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal
						}

	sell_thaler_saxon_thaler_currency_crisis = {

		#scope:
		scope:seller = {
			save_scope_as = seller_root
			every_scope_state = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						is_capital = yes
					}
					save_scope_as = central_bank_site_root
				}
			}
		}
		scope:target_country = {
			save_scope_as = overrated_currency_country_owner
			every_scope_state = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
						is_capital = yes
					}
					save_scope_as = central_bank_site_overrated_currency_owner
				}
			}
		}

		#mecha
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = scope:overrated_currency_country_owner
				scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = {
					has_law = law_type:law_thaler_saxon_thaler_currency
					sell_currency_crisis_1 = yes
				}
			}

			scope:seller_root = {
				set_variable = {
					name = thaler_saxon_thaler_quantity_var
					value = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_state
				}
				set_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
					value = var:thaler_saxon_thaler_quantity_var
				}

				set_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal
					value = {
						value = 1
						add = var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
						multiply = scope:overrated_currency_country_owner.money_value_target_real #money_value
					}
				}

				#gold
				if = {
					limit = {
						law_thaler_saxon_thaler_monetary_system_GS_GES_trigger = yes
					}
					# scope:central_bank_site_root = {
					# 	#metal
					# 	change_variable = {
					# 		name = gold_state_1
					# 		add = owner.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal
					# 	}
					# }

					if = {
						limit = {
							var:stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency > 0
						}
						set_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							value = 0
						}
					}
					scope:central_bank_site_root = {
						set_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_state_1
							value = 0
						}
					}

					if = { #actualise la variable
						limit = {
							not  = {
								scope:central_bank_site_root.var:stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1 = var:stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_root = {
							set_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1
								value = PREV.var:stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
					}
					#notification
					every_country = {
						limit  = {
							is_player = yes
						}
						save_scope_as = is_player_for_notification
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = scope:is_player_for_notification
						}
						scope:is_player_for_notification = {
							post_notification = unstable_currency_message
						}
					}
				}

				#silver
				if = {
					limit = {
						law_thaler_saxon_thaler_monetary_system_SS_BS_trigger = yes
					}
					# scope:central_bank_site_root = {
					# 	#metal
					# 	change_variable = {
					# 		name = silver_state_1
					# 		add = owner.var:stockpiling_overrated_currency_state_1_buy_in_metal
					# 	}
					# }

					if = {
						limit = {
							var:stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency > 0
						}
						set_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							value = 0
						}
					}
					scope:central_bank_site_root = {
						set_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_state_1
							value = 0
						}
					}

					if = { #actualise la variable
						limit = {
							not  = {
								scope:central_bank_site_root.var:stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1 = var:stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_root = {
							set_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1
								value = PREV.var:stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
					}
					#notification
					every_country = {
						limit  = {
							is_player = yes
						}
						save_scope_as = is_player_for_notification
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = scope:is_player_for_notification
						}
						scope:is_player_for_notification = {
							post_notification = unstable_currency_message
						}
					}
				}

				#fiat
				if = {
					limit = {
						law_thaler_saxon_thaler_monetary_system_FS_trigger = yes
					}

					if = {
						limit = {
							var:stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency > 0
						}
						set_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							value = 0
						}
					}
					scope:central_bank_site_root = {
						set_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_state_1
							value = 0
						}
					}

					if = { #actualise la variable
						limit = {
							not  = {
								scope:central_bank_site_root.var:stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1 = var:stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_root = {
							set_variable = {
								name = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_reserve_currency_state_1
								value = PREV.var:stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_c_in_reserve_currency
							}
						}
					}
					#notification
					every_country = {
						limit  = {
							is_player = yes
						}
						save_scope_as = is_player_for_notification
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							scope:overrated_currency_country_owner = scope:is_player_for_notification
						}
						scope:is_player_for_notification = {
							post_notification = unstable_currency_message

					#gold

							law_thaler_saxon_thaler_monetary_system_GS_GES_trigger = yes
						}
						scope:central_bank_site_overrated_currency_owner = {
							set_variable = {

							}
							# change_variable = {
							# 	name = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_state_1
							# 	add = scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
							# }

					}
					#silver

#brace

sell_private_bank_reserve_currency = {
	#company_Rothschild_Bank_gbr
	if = {
		limit = {
			scope:seller = {
				is_company_type = company_type:company_Rothschild_Bank_gbr
			}
 		}
		set_variable = {
			name = sell_arbitrage_value_10_in_currency
			value = global_var:stockpiling_$currency$_company_Rothschild_Bank_gbr_fixe
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = sell_arbitrage_value_10_in_currency
			multiply = 0.1 #10% de la vente maximal à chaque atbitrage
		}

		change_global_variable = {
			name = stockpiling_$currency$_company_Rothschild_Bank_gbr_fixe
			subtract = var:sell_arbitrage_value_10_in_currency
		}
	}
	#company_Rothschild_Bank_fra
	if = {
		limit = {
			scope:seller = {
				is_company_type = company_type:company_Rothschild_Bank_fra
			}
			global_var:stockpiling_$currency$_company_Rothschild_Bank_fra_fixe > 1000000
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = sell_arbitrage_value_10_in_currency
			value = global_var:stockpiling_$currency$_company_Rothschild_Bank_fra_fixe
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = sell_arbitrage_value_10_in_currency
			multiply = 0.1 #10% de la vente maximal à chaque atbitrage
		}

		change_global_variable = {

private_bank_arbitrage_gold_drain = {
	#company_Rothschild_Bank_gbr
	if = {
		limit = {
			scope:arbitrage_privat_bank = {
				is_company_type = company_type:company_Rothschild_Bank_gbr
			}
		}
		change_global_variable = {
			name = company_Rothschild_Bank_gbr_gold_stockpile_fix
			add = var:gold_state_1_fix
		}
		change_global_variable = {
			name = company_Rothschild_Bank_gbr_silver_stockpile_fix
			subtract = var:silver_state_1_fix
		}
	}
	#company_Rothschild_Bank_fra
	if = {

				has_law = law_type:law_thaler_saxon_thaler_currency
			}
			buy_currency_privat_bank =  {
				currency = thaler_saxon_thaler
			}
		}
	#brace

	#################################################
	#notif
	#################################################

	if = {
		limit = {
			exists = scope:buyer #buyer_country
		}
		#hausse du taux de base
		if  = {
			limit = {
				is_set = var:rise_base_rate
			}
			scope:seller = {
				if  = {
					limit = {
						is_player = yes
					}
					scope:buyer_country = {
						capital= {
							save_scope_as = capital_state
						}
					}

					trigger_event = 00_ef_economic_event.97
				}
			}
			remove_variable = rise_base_rate
		}
		#achat de la oney de reserve
		if  = {
			limit = {
				is_set = var:global_monetary_reference_arbitrage
			}
			scope:seller = {
				if  = {
					limit = {
						is_player = yes
					}
					scope:buyer_country = {
						capital= {
							save_scope_as = capital_state
						}
					}

					trigger_event = 00_ef_economic_event.971
				}
			}
			remove_variable = global_monetary_reference_arbitrage
		}
	}
}
buy_currency_privat_bank = {

	#scope:
	root = {
		save_scope_as = seller
		every_scope_state = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
					is_capital = yes
				}
				save_scope_as = central_bank_site
			}
		}
	}

	random_in_global_list = {
		variable = global_arbitrage_bank_variable_list_ordered #private bank
		save_scope_as = buyer
	}

	scope:buyer.owner = {
		save_scope_as = buyer_country
	}

	#mecha
	if = {
		limit = {
			exists = scope:seller
			scope:seller = {
				has_law = law_type:law_$currency$_currency
				#buy_currency_1 = yes
			}
		}

		scope:buyer_country = {
			#gold
			if = {
				limit = {
					law_$currency$_monetary_system_GS_GES_trigger = yes
				}

				if = {
					limit = {
						investment_pool_10_in_gold < scope:seller.central_bank_debt_05_for_privat_bank
					}
					set_variable = {
						name = arbitrage_value_in_metal
						value = investment_pool_10_in_gold
					}
					scope:central_bank_site = {
						change_variable = {
							name = gold_state_1
							add = scope:buyer_country.var:arbitrage_value_in_metal
						}
					}

					private_bank_gold_lose = yes

					# add_investment_pool = {
					# 	subtract = var:arbitrage_value_in_metal
					# }
					set_variable = {
						name = arbitrage_value_in_currency
						value = {
							add = var:arbitrage_value_in_metal
							divide = scope:seller.money_value
						}
					}
				}
				if = {
					limit = {
						investment_pool_10_in_gold > scope:seller.central_bank_debt_05_for_privat_bank
					}
					set_variable = {
						name = arbitrage_value_in_metal
						value = scope:seller.central_bank_debt_05_for_privat_bank
					}
					scope:central_bank_site = {
						change_variable = {
							name = gold_state_1
							add = scope:buyer_country.var:arbitrage_value_in_metal
						}
					}
					private_bank_gold_lose = yes

					# add_investment_pool = {
					# 	subtract = var:arbitrage_value_in_metal
					# }
					set_variable = {
						name = arbitrage_value_in_currency
						value = {
							add = var:arbitrage_value_in_metal
							divide = scope:seller.money_value
						}
					}
				}
			}
			#silver
			if = {
				limit = {
					law_$currency$_monetary_system_SS_BS_trigger = yes
				}

				if = {
					limit = {
						investment_pool_10_in_silver < scope:seller.central_bank_debt_05_for_privat_bank
					}
					set_variable = {
						name = arbitrage_value_in_metal
						value = investment_pool_10_in_silver
					}
					scope:central_bank_site = {
						change_variable = {
							name = silver_state_1
							add = scope:buyer_country.var:arbitrage_value_in_metal
						}
					}

					private_bank_silver_lose = yes

					# add_investment_pool = {
					# 	subtract = var:arbitrage_value_in_metal
					# }
					set_variable = {
						name = arbitrage_value_in_currency
						value = {
							add = var:arbitrage_value_in_metal
							divide = scope:seller.money_value
						}
					}
				}
				if = {
					limit = {
						investment_pool_10_in_silver > scope:seller.central_bank_debt_05_for_privat_bank
					}
					set_variable = {
						name = arbitrage_value_in_metal
						value = scope:seller.central_bank_debt_05_for_privat_bank
					}
					scope:central_bank_site = {
						change_variable = {
							name = silver_state_1
							add = scope:buyer_country.var:arbitrage_value_in_metal
						}
					}

					private_bank_silver_lose = yes

					# add_investment_pool = {
					# 	subtract = var:arbitrage_value_in_metal
					# }
					set_variable = {
						name = arbitrage_value_in_currency
						value = {
							add = var:arbitrage_value_in_metal
							divide = scope:seller.money_value
						}
					}
				}
			}

			if  = {
				limit = {
					var:arbitrage_value_in_currency > 0
				}
				private_bank_reserve_currency =  {
					CURRENCY = $currency$
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

	#brace
		#dinar

		}
		#thaler_saxon_thaler
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_law = law_type:law_thaler_saxon_thaler_currency
			}
			sell_currency_privat_bank =  {
				currency = thaler_saxon_thaler
			}
		}
 	#brace

	#################################################
	#notif
	#################################################

	if = {
		limit = {
			exists = scope:seller #seller_country
		}
		#baisse du taux de base
		if  = {
			limit = {
				is_set = var:down_base_rate
			}
			scope:buyer = {
				if  = {
					limit = {
						is_player = yes
					}
					scope:seller_country = {
						capital= {
							save_scope_as = capital_state
						}
					}

					trigger_event = 00_ef_economic_event.98
				}
			}
			remove_variable = down_base_rate
		}
		#revaluation de la currency
		if  = {
			limit = {
				is_set = var:revaluation_currency_target
			}
			scope:buyer = {
				if  = {
					limit = {
						is_player = yes
					}
					scope:seller_country = {
						capital= {
							save_scope_as = capital_state
						}
					}

					trigger_event = 00_ef_economic_event.981
				}
			}
			remove_variable = revaluation_currency_target
		}
		#Attaque sur la currency
		if  = {
			limit = {
				is_set = var:attack_on_currency
			}
			scope:buyer = {
				if  = {
					limit = {
						is_player = yes
					}
					scope:seller_country = {
						capital= {
							save_scope_as = capital_state
						}
					}

					trigger_event = 00_ef_economic_event.982
				}
			}
			remove_variable = attack_on_currency
		}
	}
}
sell_currency_privat_bank = {

	#scope:
	root = {
		save_scope_as = buyer
		every_scope_state = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
					is_capital = yes
				}
				save_scope_as = central_bank_site
			}
		}
	}

	sell_currency_privat_bank_variable_list = {
		currency = $currency$
	}

	random_in_list = {
		variable = sell_currency_privat_bank_variable_list_ordered #private bank
		save_scope_as = seller
	}

	scope:seller.owner = {
		save_scope_as = seller_country
	}

	#mecha
	if = {
		limit = {
			exists = scope:buyer
			scope:buyer = {
				has_law = law_type:law_$currency$_currency
			}
		}

		sell_private_bank_reserve_currency = {
			currency = $currency$
		}

		scope:buyer = {
			#gold
			if = {
				limit = {
					law_$currency$_monetary_system_GS_GES_trigger = yes
				}
				set_variable = {
					name = sell_arbitrage_value_in_metal
					value = {
						add = var:sell_arbitrage_value_10_in_currency
						multiply = money_value
					}
				}

				if = {
					limit = {
						var:sell_arbitrage_value_in_metal < gold_state_native_for_stockpile
					}
					scope:central_bank_site = {
						change_variable = {
							name = gold_state_1
							subtract = scope:buyer.var:sell_arbitrage_value_in_metal
						}

						change_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_$currency$_state_1
							add = scope:buyer.var:sell_arbitrage_value_10_in_currency
						}
					}
				}

				private_bank_gold_gain = yes
			}
			#silver
			if = {
				limit = {
					law_$currency$_monetary_system_SS_BS_trigger = yes
				}
				set_variable = {
					name = sell_arbitrage_value_in_metal
					value = {
						add = var:sell_arbitrage_value_10_in_currency
						multiply = money_value
					}
				}

				if = {
					limit = {
						var:sell_arbitrage_value_in_metal < silver_state_native_for_stockpile
					}
					scope:central_bank_site = {
						change_variable = {
							name = silver_state_1
							subtract = scope:buyer.var:sell_arbitrage_value_in_metal
						}

						change_variable = {
							name = stockpiling_$currency$_state_1
							add = scope:buyer.var:sell_arbitrage_value_10_in_currency
						}
					}
				}

				private_bank_silver_gain = yes
			}
		}
	}
}

reset_debt_in_national_currency_player = {
	#dinar
	if  = {
		limit  = {
			scope:player_country = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_currency
			}
			var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar > 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = debt_in_national_currency_dinar
			subtract = scope:player_country.var:currency_quantity
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar < 0
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = debt_in_national_currency_dinar
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}
	#dinar_algerian_dinar
	if  = {
		limit  = {
			scope:player_country = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_algerian_dinar_currency
			}
			var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar_algerian_dinar > 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = debt_in_national_currency_dinar_algerian_dinar
			subtract = scope:player_country.var:currency_quantity
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar_algerian_dinar < 0
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = debt_in_national_currency_dinar_algerian_dinar
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}

			var:debt_in_national_currency_peso_bolivien_peso > 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = debt_in_national_currency_peso_bolivien_peso
			subtract = scope:player_country.var:currency_quantity
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:debt_in_national_currency_peso_bolivien_peso < 0
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = debt_in_national_currency_peso_bolivien_peso
				value = 0
			}
		}

				has_law = law_type:law_spe_zloti_currency
			}
			var:debt_in_national_currency_spe_zloti > 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = debt_in_national_currency_spe_zloti
			subtract = scope:player_country.var:currency_quantity
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:debt_in_national_currency_spe_zloti < 0
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = debt_in_national_currency_spe_zloti
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}
	#thaler_hannoveraner_thaler
	if  = {
		limit  = {
			scope:player_country = {
				has_law = law_type:law_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_currency
			}
			var:debt_in_national_currency_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler > 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = debt_in_national_currency_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler
			subtract = scope:player_country.var:currency_quantity
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:debt_in_national_currency_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler < 0
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = debt_in_national_currency_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}
	#thaler_prussian_thaler
	if  = {
		limit  = {
			scope:player_country = {
				has_law = law_type:law_thaler_prussian_thaler_currency
			}
			var:debt_in_national_currency_thaler_prussian_thaler > 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = debt_in_national_currency_thaler_prussian_thaler
			subtract = scope:player_country.var:currency_quantity
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:debt_in_national_currency_thaler_prussian_thaler < 0
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = debt_in_national_currency_thaler_prussian_thaler
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}
	#thaler_saxon_thaler
	if  = {
		limit  = {
			scope:player_country = {
				has_law = law_type:law_thaler_saxon_thaler_currency
			}
			var:debt_in_national_currency_thaler_saxon_thaler > 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = debt_in_national_currency_thaler_saxon_thaler
			subtract = scope:player_country.var:currency_quantity
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:debt_in_national_currency_thaler_saxon_thaler < 0
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = debt_in_national_currency_thaler_saxon_thaler
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}
}

stockpiling_capital_state_transfert = {
	financial_center_modifier = yes

	every_scope_state = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
				is_capital = yes
			}
			save_scope_as = central_bank_site_capital
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
				is_capital = no
			}
			save_scope_as = central_bank_site_no_capital
		}
	}

	if  = {
		limit = {
			exists = scope:central_bank_site_no_capital
		}

		#actual Capital
		scope:central_bank_site_capital = {

			#####################
			#metal
			#####################

			change_variable = {
				name = gold_state_1
				add = {
					scope:central_bank_site_no_capital = {
						add = var:gold_state_1
					}
				}
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = silver_state_1
				add = {
					scope:central_bank_site_no_capital = {
						add = var:silver_state_1
					}
				}
			}

			#####################
			#Goods
			#####################

			change_variable = {
				name = stockpiling_ammunition_state_1
				add = {
					scope:central_bank_site_no_capital = {
						add = var:stockpiling_ammunition_state_1
					}
				}
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = stockpiling_small_arms_state_1

				#####################
				#modifier
				#####################

				remove_modifier = central_bank_place
				remove_modifier = central_bank_historic_place

				remove_modifier = national_stockpile_place
				remove_modifier = national_stockpile_historic_place

				add_modifier = {
					name = looted_state
					months = 3
				}
			}
		}
	}

	if = {
		limit = {
			any_scope_state = {
				var:financial_center_site_var = 0
				or = {
					var:stockpiling_bond_var_state_1 > 0
					var:stockpiling_manufacture_stock_var_state_1 > 0
					var:stockpiling_agricultural_stock_var_state_1 > 0
					var:stockpiling_mining_stock_var_state_1 > 0
					var:stockpiling_railroad_stock_var_state_1 > 0
				}
			}
		}
		stockpiling_capital_state_transfert_financial_center_place = yes
	}
}
stockpiling_capital_state_transfert_financial_center_place = {
	every_scope_state = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:financial_center_site_var =  1
			}
			save_scope_as = financial_center_site_capital #non nécessairement la capital
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:financial_center_site_var = 0
				not = {
					var:looted_state = 1
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = financial_center_site_no_capital #non nécessairement la capital
		}
	}
	if  = {
		limit  = {
			exists = scope:financial_center_site_no_capital
			#exists = scope:financial_center_site_capital
		}

		#actual Capital
		scope:financial_center_site_capital = {

			change_variable = {
				name = test_var_1
				add = 1
			}

			#####################
			#financial product
			#####################

			change_variable = {
				name = stockpiling_bond_var_state_1
				add = {
					scope:financial_center_site_no_capital = {
						add = var:stockpiling_bond_var_state_1
					}
				}
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = stockpiling_manufacture_stock_var_state_1
				add = {
					scope:financial_center_site_no_capital = {
						add = var:stockpiling_manufacture_stock_var_state_1
					}
				}
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = stockpiling_agricultural_stock_var_state_1
				add = {
					scope:financial_center_site_no_capital = {
						add = var:stockpiling_agricultural_stock_var_state_1
					}
				}
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = stockpiling_mining_stock_var_state_1
				add = {
					scope:financial_center_site_no_capital = {
						add = var:stockpiling_mining_stock_var_state_1
					}
				}
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = stockpiling_railroad_stock_var_state_1
				add = {
					scope:financial_center_site_no_capital = {
						add = var:stockpiling_railroad_stock_var_state_1
					}
				}
			}
		}

		#old capital
		scope:financial_center_site_no_capital = {
			if  = {
				limit  = {
					exists = scope:financial_center_site_no_capital
				}
				set_variable = {
					name = looted_state
					value = 1
				}

				change_variable = {
					name = test_var_1
					add = 1
				}

				#####################
				#financial product
				#####################

				set_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_bond_var_state_1
					value = 0
				}
				set_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_manufacture_stock_var_state_1
					value = 0
				}
				set_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_agricultural_stock_var_state_1
					value = 0
				}
				set_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_mining_stock_var_state_1
					value = 0
				}
				set_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_railroad_stock_var_state_1
					value = 0
				}
			}
		}
	}
}
enemy_capital_is_occuped = {
	set_variable  = {
		name = looting_1_year
		value = 1
	}

	every_scope_state = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_modifier = central_bank_historic_place
				is_capital = yes
			}
			save_scope_as = central_bank_site_capital
		}
	}
	every_country = {
		limit = {
			is_at_war = yes
			has_war_with = ROOT
		}
		capital = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					controller = ROOT
					has_modifier = central_bank_place

				}
				save_scope_as = occupied_capital
			}
		}
	}

	if  = {
		limit = {
			exists = scope:occupied_capital
		}

		scope:central_bank_site_capital = {

			owner  = {
				change_infamy = 50
			}

			#####################
			#gold
			#####################

			change_variable = {
				name = gold_state_1
				add = {
					scope:occupied_capital = {
						add = var:gold_state_1
						multiply = 0.5
					}
				}
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = silver_state_1
				add = {
					scope:occupied_capital = {
						add = var:silver_state_1
						multiply = 0.5
					}
				}
			}

			#####################
			#Goods
			#####################

			change_variable = {
				name = stockpiling_ammunition_state_1
				add = {
					scope:occupied_capital = {
						add = var:stockpiling_ammunition_state_1
						multiply = 0.5
					}
				}
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = stockpiling_small_arms_state_1
				add = {
					scope:occupied_capital = {
						add = var:stockpiling_small_arms_state_1
						multiply = 0.5
					}
				}
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = stockpiling_artillery_state_1
				add = {
					scope:occupied_capital = {
						add = var:stockpiling_artillery_state_1
						multiply = 0.5
					}
				}
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = stockpiling_tanks_state_1
				add = {
					scope:occupied_capital = {
						add = var:stockpiling_tanks_state_1
						multiply = 0.5
					}
				}
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = stockpiling_aeroplanes_state_1
				add = {
					scope:occupied_capital = {
						add = var:stockpiling_aeroplanes_state_1
						multiply = 0.5
					}
				}
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = stockpiling_grain_state_1
				add = {
					scope:occupied_capital = {
						add = var:stockpiling_grain_state_1
						multiply = 0.5
					}
				}
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = stockpiling_fabric_state_1
				add = {
					scope:occupied_capital = {
						add = var:stockpiling_fabric_state_1
						multiply = 0.5
					}
				}
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = stockpiling_wood_state_1
				add = {
					scope:occupied_capital = {
						add = var:stockpiling_wood_state_1
						multiply = 0.5
					}
				}
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = stockpiling_groceries_state_1
				add = {
					scope:occupied_capital = {
						add = var:stockpiling_groceries_state_1
						multiply = 0.5
					}
				}
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = stockpiling_clothes_state_1
				add = {
					scope:occupied_capital = {
						add = var:stockpiling_clothes_state_1
						multiply = 0.5
					}
				}
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = stockpiling_paper_state_1
				add = {
					scope:occupied_capital = {
						add = var:stockpiling_paper_state_1
						multiply = 0.5
					}
				}
			}
			change_variable = {
				name = stockpiling_silk_state_1
				add = {

					name = stockpiling_spe_peseta_state_1
					divide = 2
				}
				change_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_spe_ruble_state_1
					divide = 2
				}
				change_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_spe_uni_state_1
					divide = 2
				}
				change_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_spe_yen_state_1
					divide = 2
				}
				change_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_spe_yuan_state_1
					divide = 2
				}
				change_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_spe_zloti_state_1
					divide = 2
				}
				change_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_thaler_hannoveraner_thaler_state_1
					divide = 2
				}
				change_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_thaler_prussian_thaler_state_1
					divide = 2
				}
				change_variable = {
					name = stockpiling_thaler_saxon_thaler_state_1
					divide = 2
				}
			}
		}
	}

	#deesactive la bank ceentrrale jusqu'à la fin de la guerre
	scope:occupied_capital = {
		random_scope_building = {
			limit = {
				is_building_group = bg_bank
			}
			remove_modifier = modifier_desactive_bank
			add_modifier = {
				name = modifier_desactive_bank
				months = 12
			}
		}
	}

	# scope:occupied_capital = {
	# 	owner = {
	# 		remove_modifier = foreign_exchange_controls
	# 		add_modifier = {
	# 			name = foreign_exchange_controls
	# 			months = 12
	# 		}
	# 	}
	# }
	#test
	# change_variable  = {
	# 	name = num_looting
	# 	add = 1
	# }
}
enemy_stats_is_occuped = {
	every_country = {
		limit = {
			is_at_war = yes
			has_war_with = ROOT
		}
		every_scope_state = {
		#every_scope_state = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					controller = ROOT
				}
				remove_modifier = modifier_desactive_building
				add_modifier = {
					name = modifier_desactive_building
					months = 6
				}
				#save_scope_as = occupied_state
			}
		}
	}

	# #test
	# change_variable  = {
	# 	name = test_occuped
	# 	add = 1
	# }
}
