base_rate_change = {

	# # 1–5 % → encourage le crédit → pool monte

	# # 5–8 % → neutre / resserrement léger

	# # 8–10 % → panique → pool doit se contracter

	# # 10 % (cap) → urgence → signal de dévaluation



	# # --- Zone rouge basse (crise profonde) ---
	# if = {
	# 	limit = { effective_pool_growth < -0.50 }
	# 	change_variable = {
	# 		name = base_rate_percentage
	# 		add = -0.01
	# 	}
	# }

	# # --- Zone orange basse (fort soutien nécessaire) ---
	# if = {
	# 	limit = {
	# 		effective_pool_growth >= -0.50
	# 		effective_pool_growth < -0.25
	# 	}
	# 	change_variable = {
	# 		name = base_rate_percentage
	# 		add = -0.005
	# 	}
	# }

	# # --- Zone jaune basse (léger soutien) ---
	# if = {
	# 	limit = {
	# 		effective_pool_growth >= -0.25
	# 		effective_pool_growth < 0.00
	# 	}
	# 	change_variable = {
	# 		name = base_rate_percentage
	# 		add = -0.0025
	# 	}
	# }

	# # --- Zone verte basse (stabilité parfaite) ---
	# if = {
	# 	limit = {
	# 		effective_pool_growth >= 0.00
	# 		effective_pool_growth < 0.20
	# 	}
	# 	change_variable = {
	# 		name = base_rate_percentage
	# 		add = 0.00
	# 	}
	# }

	# # --- Zone verte haute (croissance saine) ---
	# if = {
	# 	limit = {
	# 		effective_pool_growth >= 0.20
	# 		effective_pool_growth < 0.50
	# 	}
	# 	change_variable = {
	# 		name = base_rate_percentage
	# 		add = 0.00
	# 	}
	# }

	# # --- Zone jaune haute (crédit trop rapide) ---
	# if = {
	# 	limit = {
	# 		effective_pool_growth >= 0.50
	# 		effective_pool_growth < 0.75
	# 	}
	# 	change_variable = {
	# 		name = base_rate_percentage
	# 		add = 0.0025
	# 	}
	# }

	# # --- Zone orange haute (surchauffe du crédit) ---
	# if = {
	# 	limit = {
	# 		effective_pool_growth >= 0.75
	# 		effective_pool_growth < 1.00
	# 	}
	# 	change_variable = {
	# 		name = base_rate_percentage
	# 		add = 0.0050
	# 	}
	# }

	# # --- Zone rouge haute (bulle financière, urgence) ---
	# if = {
	# 	limit = {
	# 		effective_pool_growth >= 1.00
	# 	}
	# 	change_variable = {
	# 		name = base_rate_percentage
	# 		add = 0.01
	# 	}
	# }


	# ###########################################################################################################################################################################################
	# ###########################################################################################################################################################################################
	# # --- Ajustement basé sur la couverture métallique ---

	# # Couverture moyenne 40–60% → petit +0.5%
	# if = {
	# 	limit = {
	# 		central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent >= 0.40
	# 		central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 0.60
	# 	}
	# 	change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = 0.005 }
	# }

	# # Couverture basse 30–40% → +1%
	# if = {
	# 	limit = {
	# 		central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent >= 0.30
	# 		central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 0.40
	# 	}
	# 	change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = 0.01 }
	# }

	# # Couverture catastrophique < 30% → +2%
	# if = {
	# 	limit = {
	# 		central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 0.30
	# 	}
	# 	change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = 0.02 }
	# }

	# ###########################################################################################################################################################################################
	# ###########################################################################################################################################################################################


	# ###########################################################################################################################################################################################
	# ###########################################################################################################################################################################################
	# # --- Ajustement basé sur la part du secteur privé ---

	# if = {
	# 	limit = { private_bank_funds >  private_bank_funds_limit_60 }
	# 	change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = 0.005 }
	# }

	# if = {
	# 	limit = { private_bank_funds > private_bank_funds_limit_80 }
	# 	change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = 0.01 }
	# }

	# if = {
	# 	limit = { private_bank_funds > private_bank_funds_limit }
	# 	change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = 0.02 }
	# }

	# ###########################################################################################################################################################################################
	# ###########################################################################################################################################################################################

	# # --- Ajustement basé sur la target ---> va crer bcp de mouvment du taux

	# # # delta = target - taux
	# # base_rate_percentage_delta = {
	# # 	value = var:base_rate_percentage_target
	# # 	subtract = var:base_rate_percentage
	# # }

	# # si |delta| > 2% → ±0.005
	# if = {
	# 	limit = { base_rate_percentage_delta > 0.02 }
	# 	change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = 0.005 }
	# }
	# if = {
	# 	limit = { base_rate_percentage_delta < -0.02 }
	# 	change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = -0.005 }
	# }

	# # si 1% < |delta| ≤ 2% → ±0.002
	# if = {
	# 	limit = {
	# 		base_rate_percentage_delta >= 0.01
	# 		base_rate_percentage_delta <= 0.02
	# 	}
	# 	change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = 0.002 }
	# }
	# if = {
	# 	limit = {
	# 		base_rate_percentage_delta <= -0.01
	# 		base_rate_percentage_delta >= -0.02
	# 	}
	# 	change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = -0.002 }
	# }

	###########################################################################################################################################################################################
	###########################################################################################################################################################################################

	###########################################################################################################################################################################################
	###########################################################################################################################################################################################


	###########################################################################################################################################################################################
	###########################################################################################################################################################################################

	###########################################################################################################################################################################################
	###########################################################################################################################################################################################

	###########################################################################################################################################################################################
	###########################################################################################################################################################################################

	###########################################################################################################################################################################################
	###########################################################################################################################################################################################

	set_variable = {
		name = base_rate_percentage_old
		value = var:base_rate_percentage #-0.01
	}

	# --- ZONE NEUTRE 6–7% : sortis de la zone neutre  ---
	if = {
		limit = {
			var:base_rate_percentage >= 0.06
            var:base_rate_percentage <= 0.07
		}

		# Si pool privé trop faible (<15%) → remonter vers 7%
		if = {
			limit = { private_bank_funds < private_bank_funds_min_limit } #private_bank_funds_min_limit
			change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = -0.001 }   # léger upward
		}

		# Si pool privé suffisant mais sous-utilisé → baisser légèrement
		if = {
			limit = {
				private_bank_funds_pourcent >= 0.15
				# or = {
				# 	private_bank_funds_prevision < private_bank_funds_limit
				# 	private_bank_funds < private_bank_funds_limit
				# }
			    private_bank_funds < private_bank_funds_limit
 			}
			change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = -0.001 }  # léger downward
		}
		# Si coverage très mauvais → remonter un peu
		if = {
			limit = {
				# or = {
				# 	private_bank_funds_prevision > private_bank_funds_limit
				# 	private_bank_funds > private_bank_funds_limit
				# }
			    private_bank_funds > private_bank_funds_limit
			}
			change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = 0.001 }
		}

		# Si coverage très mauvais → remonter un peu
		if = {
			limit = { central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 0.70 }
			change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = 0.001 }
		}
		# Si coverage excellent → tendance légère à baisser
		if = {
			limit = { central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent > 1.10 }
			change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = -0.001 }
		}
	}

	#base_rate_direction_rebalancing_pos_to_neutral
	if = {
		limit = {
			private_bank_borrowings_year > 0
			# or = {
			# 	private_bank_funds_prevision > private_bank_funds_limit
			# 	private_bank_funds > private_bank_funds_limit
			# }
		    private_bank_funds > private_bank_funds_limit
			var:base_rate_percentage < 0.06
		}
		change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = 0.01 }
	}
	#base_rate_direction_pos_borrowing
 	if = {
		limit = {
			private_bank_borrowings_year > 0
			# or = {
			# 	private_bank_funds_prevision < private_bank_funds_limit
			# 	private_bank_funds < private_bank_funds_limit
			# }
		    private_bank_funds < private_bank_funds_limit
			var:base_rate_percentage < 0.06
			var:base_rate_percentage >= 0.02
		}

		# --- PROGRESSION DU TAUX POSITIF (freinage du crédit privé) ---

		# Coverage critique (<60%) → ajustement MINIMAL
		if = {
			limit = { central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 0.60 }
			change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = -0.001 }
		}

		# Coverage faible (60–80%) → petite hausse
		if = {
			limit = {
				central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent >= 0.60
				central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 0.80
			}
			change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = -0.003 }
		}

		# Coverage normal (80–100%) → hausse modérée
		if = {
			limit = {
				central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent >= 0.80
				central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 1.00
			}
			change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = -0.006 }
		}

		# Coverage bon (100–120%) → hausse forte
		if = {
			limit = {
				central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent >= 1.00
				central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 1.20
			}
			change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = -0.008 }
		}

		# Coverage excédentaire (>120%) → hausse TRÈS forte
		if = {
			limit = { central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent >= 1.20 }
			change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = -0.010 }
		}
	}

	#base_rate_direction_rebalancing_neg_to_neutral
	if = {
		limit = {
			private_bank_borrowings_year < 0
			private_bank_funds < private_bank_funds_min_limit #private_bank_funds_pourcent < 0.15
			var:base_rate_percentage > 0.07
		}
		change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = -0.01 }
	}
	#base_rate_direction_neg_borrowing
 	if = {
		limit = {
			private_bank_borrowings_year < 0
		    private_bank_funds > private_bank_funds_min_limit #private_bank_funds_pourcent > 0.15
			var:base_rate_percentage > 0.7
			var:base_rate_percentage <= 0.11
		}

		# Coverage critique (<60%) → hausse très forte
		if = {
			limit = { central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 0.60 }
			change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = 0.010 }
		}

		# Coverage faible (60–80%) → hausse forte
		if = {
			limit = {
				central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent >= 0.60
				central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 0.80
			}
			change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = 0.008 }
		}

		# Coverage normal (80–100%) → hausse modérée
		if = {
			limit = {
				central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent >= 0.80
				central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 1.00
			}
			change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = 0.006 }
		}

		# Coverage bon (100–120%) → hausse légère
		if = {
			limit = {
				central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent >= 1.00
				central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 1.20
			}
			change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = 0.003 }
		}

		# Coverage excédentaire (>120%) → hausse minimale
		if = {
			limit = { central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent >= 1.20 }
			change_variable = { name = base_rate_percentage add = 0.001 }
		}
	}

	#modifier
	if = {
		limit = {
			var:base_rate_percentage_old > var:base_rate_percentage
		}
		remove_modifier = down_base_rate
		add_modifier = {
			name = down_base_rate
			months = 6
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			var:base_rate_percentage_old < var:base_rate_percentage
		}
		remove_modifier = rise_base_rate
		add_modifier = {
			name = rise_base_rate
			months = 6
		}
	}

	#at 1 year -> setting initiale

	#crer une aide de la bc pour le secteur privé si pb
	if = {
		limit = {
			private_bank_funds_pourcent < 0.05
			not = {
				has_modifier = economic_instability
			}
			game_date < 1840.1.1
		}
		add_investment_pool = {
			add = {
				add = money_supply
				multiply = 0.20
			}
		}
	}

	#protège taux de base trop haut
	if = {
		limit = {
			var:base_rate_percentage >= 0.12
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = base_rate_percentage
			value = { 0.11 0.12 }
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			var:base_rate_percentage <= 0.001
		}
		set_variable = {
			name = base_rate_percentage
			value = { 0.002 0.001 }
		}
	}
}
investement_pool_borrowing = {
	# if = {

	# 		is_ai = yes
	# 	}





	# 	# #more economic_instability - 10%

	# 	# 	set_variable = {

	# 	# 		value = 0.1

	# 	# #more 75% - 10%
	# 	# if = {

	# 	# 		not = {

	# 	# 		value = 0.1

	# 	# }
	# 	# #more 50% - 8%
	# 	# else_if = {

	# 	# 		private_bank_funds_pourcent > 0.5
	# 	# 		not = {
	# 	# 			has_modifier = economic_instability
	# 	# 		}
	# 	# 	}
	# 	# 	set_variable = {
	# 	# 		name = base_rate_percentage
	# 	# 		value = 0.08
	# 	# 	}
	# 	# }
	# 	# else_if = {
	# 	# 	limit = {
	# 	# 		private_bank_funds_pourcent < 0.40
	# 	# 		private_bank_funds_pourcent > 0.35
	# 	# 		not = {
	# 	# 			has_modifier = economic_instability
	# 	# 		}
	# 	# 	}
	# 	# 	set_variable = {
	# 	# 		name = base_rate_percentage
	# 	# 		value = 0.08
	# 	# 	}
	# 	# }
	# 	# else_if = {
	# 	# 	limit = {
	# 	# 		private_bank_funds_pourcent < 0.35
	# 	# 		private_bank_funds_pourcent > 0.30
	# 	# 		not = {
	# 	# 			has_modifier = economic_instability
	# 	# 		}
	# 	# 	}
	# 	# 	set_variable = {
	# 	# 		name = base_rate_percentage
	# 	# 		value = 0.07
	# 	# 	}
	# 	# }
	# 	# else_if = {
	# 	# 	limit = {
	# 	# 		private_bank_funds_pourcent < 0.30
	# 	# 		private_bank_funds_pourcent > 0.25
	# 	# 		not = {
	# 	# 			has_modifier = economic_instability
	# 	# 		}
	# 	# 	}
	# 	# 	set_variable = {
	# 	# 		name = base_rate_percentage
	# 	# 		value = 0.06
	# 	# 	}
	# 	# }
	# 	# else_if = {
	# 	# 	limit = {
	# 	# 		private_bank_funds_pourcent < 0.25
	# 	# 		private_bank_funds_pourcent > 0.20
	# 	# 		not = {
	# 	# 			has_modifier = economic_instability
	# 	# 		}
	# 	# 	}
	# 	# 	set_variable = {
	# 	# 		name = base_rate_percentage
	# 	# 		value = 0.05
	# 	# 	}
	# 	# }
	# 	# else_if = {
	# 	# 	limit = {
	# 	# 		private_bank_funds_pourcent < 0.20
	# 	# 		private_bank_funds_pourcent > 0.15
	# 	# 		not = {
	# 	# 			has_modifier = economic_instability
	# 	# 		}

	# 	# 	}
	# 	# 	set_variable = {
	# 	# 		name = base_rate_percentage
	# 	# 		value = 0.04
	# 	# 	}
	# 	# }
	# 	# else_if = {
	# 	# 	limit = {
	# 	# 		private_bank_funds_pourcent < 0.15
	# 	# 		private_bank_funds_pourcent > 0.10
	# 	# 		not = {
	# 	# 			has_modifier = economic_instability
	# 	# 		}

	# 	# 	}
	# 	# 	set_variable = {
	# 	# 		name = base_rate_percentage
	# 	# 		value = 0.03
	# 	# 	}
	# 	# }
	# 	# else_if = {
	# 	# 	limit = {
	# 	# 		private_bank_funds_pourcent < 0.10
	# 	# 		private_bank_funds_pourcent > 0.05
	# 	# 		not = {
	# 	# 			has_modifier = economic_instability
	# 	# 		}

	# 	# 	}
	# 	# 	set_variable = {
	# 	# 		name = base_rate_percentage
	# 	# 		value = 0.02
	# 	# 	}

	# 	# }

	# 	#at 1 year -> setting initiale
	# 	if = {
	# 		limit = {
	# 			private_bank_funds_pourcent < 0.05
	# 			not = {
	# 				has_modifier = economic_instability
	# 			}
	# 			game_date < 1840.1.1
	# 		}
	# 		set_variable = {
	# 			name = base_rate_percentage
	# 			value = { 0.04 0.06 }
	# 		}
	# 		add_investment_pool = {
	# 			add = {
	# 				add = money_supply
	# 				multiply = 0.20
	# 			}
	# 		}
	# 	}
	# }

	# #rest for market_owner_is_root_4
	# if = {
	# 	limit = {
	# 		is_player = yes
	# 		market_owner_is_root_4 = no
	# 	}
	# 	set_variable = {
	# 		name = base_rate_percentage
	# 		value = 0.1
	# 	}
	# }

		#2 possibilités
			# - remonter du taux vers la zone neutre car:
				# -------> le private_bank_funds_prevision > private_bank_funds_limit
				# -------> Et que private_bank_borrowings_year > 0
				# -------> Et que var:base_rate_percentage < 0.06

			# - progression du taux vers des valeur plus négative, car:
				# -------> le private_bank_funds_prevision < private_bank_funds_limit
				# -------> Et que private_bank_borrowings_year > 0
				# -------> Et que var:base_rate_percentage > 0.01

	if = {
		limit = {
			private_bank_borrowings_year > 0
            # or = {
            #     private_bank_funds_prevision < private_bank_funds_limit
            #     private_bank_funds < private_bank_funds_limit
            # }
		    private_bank_funds < private_bank_funds_limit

		}
		add_investment_pool = {
			add = private_bank_borrowings_year
		}

	}
		#2 possibilités
			# - redescente du taux vers la zone neutre car:
				# -------> le private_bank_funds_pourcent < 0.15
				# -------> Et que private_bank_borrowings_year < 0
				# -------> Et que var:base_rate_percentage > 0.07

			# - progression du taux vers des valeur plus négative, car:
				# -------> le private_bank_funds_pourcent > 0.15
				# -------> Et que private_bank_borrowings_year < 0
				# -------> Et que var:base_rate_percentage < 0.12
				# -------> Et que le coverage idée ,

	if = {
		limit = {
			private_bank_borrowings_year < 0
		    private_bank_funds > private_bank_funds_min_limit

			#private_bank_funds_pourcent > 0.15 #minn 15% d'équivalent du money supply protegé par l'érosion
		}
		add_investment_pool = {
			add = private_bank_borrowings_year
		}





	}


	# #pas e régulationbete et méchante comme çà
	# if = {
	# 	limit = {
	# 		central_bank_metal_reserves_state_to_ensure_the_conversion_pourcent < 0.75
	# 		private_bank_funds_pourcent > 0.4
	# 		private_bank_funds_pourcent_at_20_to_substract > 0
	# 		is_ai = yes
	# 	}
	# 	add_investment_pool = {
	# 		subtract = private_bank_funds_pourcent_at_20_to_substract
	# 	}
	# }


	#PAs de réinvestissement des dividende étangé reste dans les fon de la bank -> apliquer ces dividende au fond des bank directement

	#interret des investissement des ban privé (permet de remplir la limite en dehor de la création du pool)
		# ->>>Attention forte création monetaire donc il faut limité le retoure d'invest
		# ->>> Tan que le pool ne dépasse pas la limite on réinvesti le max, des que le réinvestissement est supérieur à la limite du pool il compléte
		# ->>> je limit le pool à 40%
		# ->>> private_bank_funds_pourcent_at_20 #limite du pool pour avoir 40% du money supply venant du pool
		# ->>>
 		if = {
			limit = {
				ai_privat_bank_total_interest > 0
				private_bank_funds_prevision_interest < private_bank_funds_limit
				or = {
					base_rate_direction_exit_neutral_zone < 0 #tendance à baisser le taux pour aller vers zone de croissance donc d'augmentation du pool
					base_rate_direction_pos_borrowing > 0 #tendance à augmenter le pool par l'augmentation du taux
					# base_rate_direction_rebalancing_pos_to_neutral #normalement le pool n'ai plus remplit car private_bank_funds_limit dépasser donc non
					# base_rate_direction_rebalancing_neg_to_neutral #non plus car risque de fairerepasser le pool sur private_bank_funds_limit et donc de tendre pour un taux plus haut donc non
					private_bank_borrowings_year > 0 #trop limité le pool peut largment croitre avant que cela ne devienne positif
				}
			}
			add_investment_pool = ai_privat_bank_total_interest #ai_privat_bank_total_interest_gui  passe à 0 quand les condition ne sont plus respecter donc pour le gui
		}
}

central_bank_production_methods = {
	every_scope_state = {

		#########################
		#pm_no_metal_consuption
		#########################
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					or  = {
						has_law = law_type:law_no_monetary_system
						has_law = law_type:law_fiat_standard
					}
					#market_owner_is_root_univ_with_buiding = no #-> pas un sujet avec bank dépendente
				}
				# is_production_method_active = {
				# 	building_type = building_bank
				# 	production_method = pm_fiat_standard_bank_money_currency
				# }
				or  = {
					is_production_method_active = {
						building_type = building_bank
						production_method = pm_silver_consuption
					}
					is_production_method_active = {
						building_type = building_bank
						production_method = pm_gold_consuption
					}
					is_production_method_active = {
						building_type = building_bank
						production_method = pm_bimetallism_consuption
					}
				}
				is_production_method_active = { #écarte les sujet sans marché
					building_type = building_bank
					production_method = pm_no_subject_currency_type
				}
			}
			activate_production_method = {
				building_type = building_bank
				production_method = pm_no_metal_consuption
			}
			activate_production_method = {
				building_type = building_bank
				production_method = pm_no_subject_currency_type
			}
		}

		# if = { #le pays est suijet et isolationiste il doit prendre la PM External exchange qui ne se met pas automatiquement

					has_law = law_type:law_bimetallism_standard

		#########################

		if = {

central_bank_production_methods_2 = { #subject
	every_scope_state = {
		#dinar
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					or = {
						any_overlord_or_above = {
							has_law = law_type:law_dinar_currency
						}
						market.owner = {
							has_law = law_type:law_dinar_currency
						}
					}
				}
				not = {
					is_production_method_active = {
						building_type = building_bank
						production_method = pm_subject_currency_dinar_currency
					}
				}
			}
			activate_production_method = {
				building_type = building_bank
				production_method = pm_subject_currency_dinar_currency
			}
			activate_production_method = {
				building_type = building_bank
				production_method = pm_no_metal_consuption
			}
		}
		#dinar_algerian_dinar
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					or = {
						any_overlord_or_above = {
							has_law = law_type:law_dinar_algerian_dinar_currency
						}
						market.owner = {
							has_law = law_type:law_dinar_algerian_dinar_currency
						}
					}
				}
				not = {
					is_production_method_active = {
						building_type = building_bank
						production_method = pm_subject_currency_dinar_algerian_dinar_currency
					}
				}
			}
			activate_production_method = {
				building_type = building_bank
				production_method = pm_subject_currency_dinar_algerian_dinar_currency
			}
			activate_production_method = {
				building_type = building_bank
				production_method = pm_no_metal_consuption
			}
		}
		#dinar_iraqi_dinar
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					or = {
						any_overlord_or_above = {
							has_law = law_type:law_dinar_iraqi_dinar_currency
						}
						market.owner = {
							has_law = law_type:law_dinar_iraqi_dinar_currency
						}
					}
				}
				not = {
					is_production_method_active = {
						building_type = building_bank
						production_method = pm_subject_currency_dinar_iraqi_dinar_currency
					}
				}
			}
			activate_production_method = {
				building_type = building_bank
				production_method = pm_subject_currency_dinar_iraqi_dinar_currency
			}
			activate_production_method = {
				building_type = building_bank
				production_method = pm_no_metal_consuption
			}
		}
		#dinar_libyan_dinar
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					or = {
						any_overlord_or_above = {
							has_law = law_type:law_dinar_libyan_dinar_currency
						}
						market.owner = {
							has_law = law_type:law_dinar_libyan_dinar_currency
						}
					}
				}
				not = {

central_bank_production_methods_2_act = {
	every_country = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				not   = {
					market.owner = this
				}
			}
			central_bank_production_methods_2 = yes
		}
	}
}

central_bank_production_methods_4 = {
	every_scope_state = {
		#-> pm_no_gold_standard_bank_money_currency
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_production_method_active = {
					building_type = building_bank
					production_method = pm_no_additional_production_method
				}
				not = {
					is_production_method_active = {
						building_type = building_bank
						production_method = pm_no_subject_currency_type
					}
				}
			}
			activate_production_method = {
				building_type = building_bank
				production_method = pm_no_subject_currency_type
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_law = law_type:law_silver_standard
			}
			activate_production_method = {
				building_type = building_bank
				production_method = pm_silver_consuption
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_law = law_type:law_bimetallism_standard
			}
			activate_production_method = {
				building_type = building_bank
				production_method = pm_bimetallism_consuption
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_law = law_type:law_gold_standard
			}
			activate_production_method = {
				building_type = building_bank
				production_method = pm_gold_consuption
			}
		}
		# # -> pm_gold_exchange_standard_bank_money_currency
		# if = {
		# 	limit = {
		# 		is_production_method_active = {  #si GES alors enlve la nécessité de l'or
		# 			building_type = building_bank
		# 			production_method = pm_gold_exchange_standard_bank_money_currency
		# 		}
		# 		is_production_method_active = {
		# 			building_type = building_bank
		# 			production_method = pm_gold_consuption
		# 		}
		# 	}
		# 	activate_production_method = {
		# 		building_type = building_bank
		# 		production_method = pm_no_metal_consuption
		# 	}
		# 	activate_production_method = {
		# 		building_type = building_bank
		# 		production_method = pm_no_subject_currency_type
		# 	}
		# }
	}
}

reset_debt_in_national_currency = {
	#dinar
	if  = {
		limit  = {
			scope:seller_root = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_currency
			}
			var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar > 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = debt_in_national_currency_dinar
			subtract = scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar < 0
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = debt_in_national_currency_dinar
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}
	#dinar_algerian_dinar
	if  = {
		limit  = {
			scope:seller_root = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_algerian_dinar_currency
			}
			var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar_algerian_dinar > 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = debt_in_national_currency_dinar_algerian_dinar
			subtract = scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar_algerian_dinar < 0
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = debt_in_national_currency_dinar_algerian_dinar
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}
	#dinar_iraqi_dinar
	if  = {
		limit  = {
			scope:seller_root = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_iraqi_dinar_currency
			}
			var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar_iraqi_dinar > 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = debt_in_national_currency_dinar_iraqi_dinar
			subtract = scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar_iraqi_dinar < 0
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = debt_in_national_currency_dinar_iraqi_dinar
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}
	#dinar_libyan_dinar
	if  = {
		limit  = {
			scope:seller_root = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_libyan_dinar_currency
			}
			var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar_libyan_dinar > 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = debt_in_national_currency_dinar_libyan_dinar
			subtract = scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar_libyan_dinar < 0
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = debt_in_national_currency_dinar_libyan_dinar
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}
	#dinar_moroccan_dirham
	if  = {
		limit  = {
			scope:seller_root = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_moroccan_dirham_currency
			}
			var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar_moroccan_dirham > 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = debt_in_national_currency_dinar_moroccan_dirham
			subtract = scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar_moroccan_dirham < 0
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = debt_in_national_currency_dinar_moroccan_dirham
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}
	#dinar_omanian_rial
	if  = {
		limit  = {
			scope:seller_root = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_omanian_rial_currency
			}
			var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar_omanian_rial > 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = debt_in_national_currency_dinar_omanian_rial
			subtract = scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar_omanian_rial < 0
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = debt_in_national_currency_dinar_omanian_rial
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}
	#dinar_qiran
	if  = {
		limit  = {
			scope:seller_root = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_qiran_currency
			}
			var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar_qiran > 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = debt_in_national_currency_dinar_qiran
			subtract = scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar_qiran < 0
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = debt_in_national_currency_dinar_qiran
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}
	#dinar_saudi_riyal
	if  = {
		limit  = {
			scope:seller_root = {
				has_law = law_type:law_dinar_saudi_riyal_currency
			}
			var:debt_in_national_currency_dinar_saudi_riyal > 0
		}

			var:debt_in_national_currency_peso_uruguayan_peso > 0
		}
		change_variable = {
			name = debt_in_national_currency_peso_uruguayan_peso
			subtract = scope:seller_root.var:stockpiling_overrated_quantity_var
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				var:debt_in_national_currency_peso_uruguayan_peso < 0
			}
			set_variable = {
				name = debt_in_national_currency_peso_uruguayan_peso
				value = 0
			}
		}
	}

	capital= {
		save_scope_as = capital_state
	}
	save_scope_as = target_country

	every_country = {
		limit = {
			is_player = yes
		}
		trigger_event = 00_ef_economic_event.29
	}

	if = {
		limit = {
			not = {
				has_law = law_type:law_gold_exchange_standard
			}
		}
		central_bank_production_methods_4 = yes
	}
}

	activate_law = law_type:law_external_exchange_standard

	# every_scope_state = {
 	# 	if = {

	central_bank_production_methods_2 = yes
	#central_bank_production_methods = yes #why not?
	money_value_target_modification = yes

	#Event for player
	capital= {
		save_scope_as = capital_state
	}
	save_scope_as = target_country

	every_country = {
		limit = {
			is_player = yes
			game_date >= 1837.1.1
		}
		trigger_event = 00_ef_economic_event.28
	}
}

private_bank_gold_lose = {

	#company_Rothschild_Bank_gbr
	if = {
		limit = {
			scope:buyer = {
				is_company_type = company_type:company_Rothschild_Bank_gbr
			}
		}
		change_global_variable = {
			name = company_Rothschild_Bank_gbr_gold_stockpile_fix
			subtract = scope:buyer_country.var:arbitrage_value_in_metal
		}
	}
	#company_Rothschild_Bank_fra

			name = company_DeNederlandscheBank_silver_stockpile_fix
			add = scope:buyer.var:sell_arbitrage_value_in_metal
		}
	}
	#company_amsterdamschebank
	if = {
		limit = {
			scope:seller = {
				is_company_type = company_type:company_amsterdamschebank
			}
		}
		change_global_variable = {
			name = company_amsterdamschebank_silver_stockpile_fix
			add = scope:buyer.var:sell_arbitrage_value_in_metal
		}
	}
	#company_RotterdamscheBankvereeniging
	if = {
		limit = {
			scope:seller = {
				is_company_type = company_type:company_RotterdamscheBankvereeniging
			}
		}
		change_global_variable = {
			name = company_RotterdamscheBankvereeniging_silver_stockpile_fix
			add = scope:buyer.var:sell_arbitrage_value_in_metal
		}
	}
	#company_BankIBC
	if = {
		limit = {
			scope:seller = {
				is_company_type = company_type:company_BankIBC
			}
		}
		change_global_variable = {
			name = company_BankIBC_silver_stockpile_fix
			add = scope:buyer.var:sell_arbitrage_value_in_metal
		}
	}
	#company_Mitsubishiexchangehousebank
	if = {
		limit = {
			scope:seller = {
				is_company_type = company_type:company_Mitsubishiexchangehousebank
			}
		}
		change_global_variable = {
			name = company_Mitsubishiexchangehousebank_silver_stockpile_fix

		}
	}
